# API Documentation: c:/Users/jacob/Development/StuckyCo/TORNagator/documentation/torn_swagger_openapi.json

## [User] GET /user/ammo
**Summary:** Get your ammo information

**Description:** Requires minimal key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "properties": {
    "ammo": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "types"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "types": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "name",
                "quantity",
                "equipped"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "name": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Standard",
                    "Hollow Point",
                    "Piercing",
                    "Tracer",
                    "Incendiary"
                  ]
                },
                "quantity": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "equipped": {
                  "type": "boolean"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/attacks
**Summary:** Get your detailed attacks

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "attacks",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "attacks": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "code",
          "started",
          "ended",
          "attacker",
          "defender",
          "result",
          "respect_gain",
          "respect_loss",
          "chain",

          "is_stealthed",
          "is_raid",
          "is_ranked_war",
          "finishing_hit_effects",
          "modifiers"

        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },

            "type": "string"
          },

            "description": "Attack start timestamp.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "ended": {
            "description": "Attack end timestamp.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "attacker": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",

                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",

            "required": [
              "id",

              "level",
              "faction"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {

              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"

                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"

                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"

            "type": "string",

            "type": "number",

          },

            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_interrupted": {
            "description": "This is an experimental flag which should help determine 'assist' attacks which have not contributed to the chain. For example, attacks such as where the opponent lost to someoene else before the attacker could finish the attack. This flag might not work entirely correctly, so use with caution.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_stealthed": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_raid": {
            "type": "boolean"
```

## [User] GET /user/attacksfull
**Summary:** Get your simplified attacks

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>Returns up to 1,000 rows. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

## [User] GET /user/basic
**Summary:** Get your basic profile information

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "profile"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "profile": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name",
        "level",
        "gender",
        "status"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "level": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "gender": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "Male",
            "Female",
            "Enby"
          ]
        },
        "status": {
          "description": "Details about a user's status.",
          "required": [
            "description",
            "details",
            "state",
            "until",
            "color"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "description": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "details": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "state": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Abroad",
                    "Awoken",
                    "Dormant",
                    "Fallen",
                    "Federal",
                    "Hospital",
                    "Jail",
                    "Okay",
                    "Traveling"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              ]
            },
            "color": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "until": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "plane_image_type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "private_jet",
                "light_aircraft",
                "airliner"
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/basic
**Summary:** Get basic profile information for a specific user

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

```json
            "color"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "description": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "details": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }

                {
                  "type": "string",

            },
```
```json
            "modifiers": {

                  "type"
                ],

                  "effect": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "value": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },

          "required": [

            "modifiers"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "modifier": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "modifiers": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "effect",
                  "value",
                  "type"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "effect": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "value": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "dexterity": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "modifier",
            "modifiers"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "modifier": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "modifiers": {
              "type": "array",

                ],

                  "effect": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },

                    "type": "integer",

                  },
                  "type": {

                  }
```

## [User] GET /user/bounties
**Summary:** Get bounties placed on you

**Description:** <b>Globally cached selection.</b><br><br>Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "bounties",
    "bounties_timestamp"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "bounties": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "target_id",
          "target_name",
          "target_level",
          "lister_id",
          "lister_name",
          "reward",
          "reason",
          "quantity",
          "is_anonymous",
          "valid_until"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "target_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "target_name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "target_level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "lister_id": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "lister_name": {
            "description": "If the bounty is anonymous this field is null.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "reward": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "reason": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "quantity": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_anonymous": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "valid_until": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "bounties_timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "bounties_delay": {
      "description": "The minimum amount of time needed before the cache timestamp can change.",
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/competition
**Summary:** Get your competition information

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "competition"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "competition": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "name",
            "treats_collected",
            "basket"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "name": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Halloween"
              ]
            },
            "treats_collected": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "basket": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "name",
            "score",
            "total"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "name": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Easter Egg Hunt"
              ]
            },
            "score": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "total": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "name",
            "status",
            "hp"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "name": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Rock, Paper, Scissors"
              ]
            },
            "status": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "scissors",
                "rock",
                "paper"
              ]
            },
            "hp": {
              "required": [
                "current",
                "maximum"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "current": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "maximum": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "name",
            "score",
            "attacks",
            "team"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "name": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Elimination"
              ]
            },
            "score": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "team": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "attacks": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/{crimeId}/crimes
**Summary:** Get your crime statistics

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>Return the details and statistics about for a specific crime.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| crimeId | path | Crime id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "crimes"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "crimes": {
      "required": [
        "nerve_spent",
        "skill",
        "progression_bonus",
        "rewards",
        "attempts",
        "uniques",
        "miscellaneous"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "nerve_spent": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "skill": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "progression_bonus": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "rewards": {
          "required": [
            "money",
            "ammo",
            "items"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "money": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "ammo": {
              "required": [
                "standard",
                "special"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "standard": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "special": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "items": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "amount"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "amount": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "attempts": {
          "required": [
            "total",
            "success",
            "fail",
            "critical_fail",
            "subcrimes"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "total": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "success": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "fail": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "critical_fail": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "subcrimes": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "total",
                  "success",
                  "fail"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "total": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "success": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "fail": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "uniques": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "rewards"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "description": "Unique result id.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "rewards": {
                "required": [
                  "items",
                  "money",
                  "ammo"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "items": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "amount"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "amount": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "money": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "min",
                          "max"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "min": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "max": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "ammo": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "amount",
                          "type"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "amount": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "type": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "standard",
                              "special"
                            ]
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "miscellaneous": {
          "description": " Miscellaneous stats for specific crime. Results differ based on the cat id.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "online_store",
                "dvd_sales",
                "dvd_copies"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "online_store": {
                  "description": "Online store statistics.",
                  "required": [
                    "earnings",
                    "visits",
                    "customers",
                    "sales"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "earnings": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "visits": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "customers": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "sales": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "dvd_sales": {
                  "description": "DVD sales statistics.",
                  "required": [
                    "action",
                    "comedy",
                    "drama",
                    "fantasy",
                    "horror",
                    "romance",
                    "thriller",
                    "sci_fi",
                    "total",
                    "earnings"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "action": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "comedy": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "drama": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "fantasy": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "horror": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "romance": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "thriller": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "sci_fi": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "total": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "earnings": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "dvds_copied": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "cans_used",
                "most_graffiti_in_one_area",
                "most_graffiti_simultaneously",
                "graffiti_removed",
                "cost_to_city"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "cans_used": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "most_graffiti_in_one_area": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "most_graffiti_simultaneously": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "graffiti_removed": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "cost_to_city": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "average_notoriety"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "average_notoriety": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "card_details",
                "skimmers"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "card_details": {
                  "required": [
                    "recoverable",
                    "recovered",
                    "sold",
                    "lost",
                    "areas"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "recoverable": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "recovered": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "sold": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "lost": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "areas": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "amount"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "amount": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "skimmers": {
                  "required": [
                    "active",
                    "most_lucrative",
                    "oldest_recovered",
                    "lost"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "active": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "most_lucrative": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "oldest_recovered": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "lost": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "total_audience_gathered",
                "biggest_money_won",
                "shill_money_collected",
                "pickpocket_money_collected"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "total_audience_gathered": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "biggest_money_won": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "shill_money_collected": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "pickpocket_money_collected": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "brute_force_cycles",
                "encryption_layers_broken",
                "highest_mips",
                "chars_guessed",
                "chars_guessed_total"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "brute_force_cycles": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "encryption_layers_broken": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "highest_mips": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "chars_guessed": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "chars_guessed_total": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "most_responses",
                "zones",
                "concerns",
                "payouts",
                "emails"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "most_responses": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32",
                  "default": 0
                },
                "zones": {
                  "required": [
                    "red",
                    "neutral",
                    "concern",
                    "sensitivity",
                    "temptation",
                    "hesitation",
                    "low_reward",
                    "medium_reward",
                    "high_reward"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "red": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "neutral": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "concern": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "sensitivity": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "temptation": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "hesitation": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "low_reward": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "medium_reward": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "high_reward": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "concerns": {
                  "required": [
                    "attempts",
                    "resolved"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "attempts": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "resolved": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "payouts": {
                  "required": [
                    "low",
                    "medium",
                    "high"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "low": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "medium": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "high": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "emails": {
                  "required": [
                    "scraper",
                    "phisher"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "scraper": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    },
                    "phisher": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "default": 0
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/discord
**Summary:** Get your discord information

**Description:** Requires public key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "discord"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "discord": {
      "required": [
        "discord_id",
        "user_id"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "discord_id": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "user_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/discord
**Summary:** Get discord information for a specific user

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "discord"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "discord": {
      "required": [
        "discord_id",
        "user_id"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "discord_id": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "user_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/education
**Summary:** Get your education information

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>The response contains a list of complete eduactions and of a current education (if any).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "education"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "education": {
      "required": [
        "complete",
        "current"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "complete": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "current": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "until"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "until": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/enlistedcars
**Summary:** Get your enlisted cars

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>Returns a list of all user enlisted cars.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "enlistedcars"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "enlistedcars": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "required": [
              "car_item_id",
              "car_item_name",
              "top_speed",
              "acceleration",
              "braking",
              "dirt",
              "handling",
              "safety",
              "tarmac",
              "class"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "car_item_id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "car_item_name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "top_speed": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "acceleration": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "braking": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "dirt": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "handling": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "safety": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "tarmac": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "class": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "A",
                  "B",
                  "C",
                  "D",
                  "E"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "worth",
              "points_spent",
              "races_entered",
              "races_won",
              "is_removed",
              "parts"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "worth": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "points_spent": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "races_entered": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "races_won": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "is_removed": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "parts": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/equipment
**Summary:** Get your equipment & clothing

**Description:** Requires minimal access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "equipment",
    "clothing"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "equipment": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "allOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "uid",
                  "stats",
                  "bonuses",
                  "rarity"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "uid": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "stats": {
                    "required": [
                      "damage",
                      "accuracy",
                      "armor",
                      "quality"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "damage": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "accuracy": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "armor": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "quality": {
                        "type": "number",
                        "format": "float"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "bonuses": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "title",
                        "description",
                        "value"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "title": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "description": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "value": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "rarity": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "yellow",
                          "orange",
                          "red"
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "type",
                  "sub_type"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Alcohol",
                      "Armor",
                      "Artifact",
                      "Book",
                      "Booster",
                      "Candy",
                      "Car",
                      "Clothing",
                      "Collectible",
                      "Drug",
                      "Energy Drink",
                      "Enhancer",
                      "Flower",
                      "Jewelry",
                      "Material",
                      "Medical",
                      "Other",
                      "Plushie",
                      "Special",
                      "Supply Pack",
                      "Tool",
                      "Unused",
                      "Weapon"
                    ]
                  },
                  "sub_type": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "Heavy artillery",
                          "Machine gun",
                          "Pistol",
                          "Rifle",
                          "Shotgun",
                          "SMG",
                          "Temporary",
                          "Clubbing",
                          "Piercing",
                          "Slashing",
                          "Mechanical"
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "required": [
              "slot",
              "ammo",
              "mods"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "slot": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "mods": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "ammo": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "type",
                  "quantity"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "quantity": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Standard",
                      "Hollow Point",
                      "Piercing",
                      "Tracer",
                      "Incendiary"
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "clothing": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "uid",
          "type"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "uid": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Alcohol",
              "Armor",
              "Artifact",
              "Book",
              "Booster",
              "Candy",
              "Car",
              "Clothing",
              "Collectible",
              "Drug",
              "Energy Drink",
              "Enhancer",
              "Flower",
              "Jewelry",
              "Material",
              "Medical",
              "Other",
              "Plushie",
              "Special",
              "Supply Pack",
              "Tool",
              "Unused",
              "Weapon"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/events
**Summary:** Get your events

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br> Unfortunately, the 'sort' parameter is not available for this selection.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "events",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "events": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "timestamp",
          "event"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "event": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/faction
**Summary:** Get your faction information

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "faction"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "faction": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name",
            "tag",
            "tag_image",
            "position",
            "days_in_faction"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "tag": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "tag_image": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "position": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "days_in_faction": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/faction
**Summary:** Get faction information for a specific player

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "faction"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "faction": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name",
            "tag",
            "tag_image",
            "position",
            "days_in_faction"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "tag": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "tag_image": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "position": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "days_in_faction": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/forumfeed
**Summary:** Get updates on your threads and posts

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>This selection returns data visible in 'Feed' section on forum page. Feed is sorted by timestamp descending. Only a maximum of 100 rows are returned.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumFeed"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumFeed": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "thread_id",
          "post_id",
          "user",
          "title",
          "text",
          "timestamp",
          "is_seen",
          "type"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "thread_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "post_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "user": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "text": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_seen": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "type": {
            "description": "This represents the type of the activity. Values range from 1 to 8 where:\n *                    1 = 'X posted on a thread',\n *                    2 = 'X created a thread',\n *                    3 = 'X liked your thread',\n *                    4 = 'X disliked your thread',\n *                    5 = 'X liked your post',\n *                    6 = 'X disliked your post',\n *                    7 = 'X quoted your post'.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32",
            "enum": [
              1,
              2,
              3,
              4,
              5,
              6,
              7
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/forumfriends
**Summary:** Get updates on your friends' activity

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>This selection returns data visible in 'Friends' section on forum page. Feed is sorted by timestamp descending. Only a maximum of 100 rows are returned.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumFriends"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumFriends": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "thread_id",
          "post_id",
          "user",
          "title",
          "text",
          "timestamp",
          "is_seen",
          "type"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "thread_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "post_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "user": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "text": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_seen": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "type": {
            "description": "This represents the type of the activity. Values range from 1 to 8 where:\n *                    1 = 'X posted on a thread',\n *                    2 = 'X created a thread',\n *                    3 = 'X liked your thread',\n *                    4 = 'X disliked your thread',\n *                    5 = 'X liked your post',\n *                    6 = 'X disliked your post',\n *                    7 = 'X quoted your post'.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32",
            "enum": [
              1,
              2,
              3,
              4,
              5,
              6,
              7
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/forumposts
**Summary:** Get your posts

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns 20 posts per page.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumPosts",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumPosts": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "thread_id",
          "author",
          "is_legacy",
          "is_topic",
          "is_edited",
          "is_pinned",
          "created_time",
          "edited_by",
          "has_quote",
          "quoted_post_id",
          "content",
          "likes",
          "dislikes"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "thread_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "author": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "is_legacy": {
            "description": "Indicates whether post was made using the old formatting engine which doesn't use HTML.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_topic": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_edited": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_pinned": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "created_time": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "edited_by": {
            "description": "'edited_by' is null when 'is_edited' is false.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "has_quote": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "quoted_post_id": {
            "description": "'quoted_post_id' is null when 'has_quote' is false.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "content": {
            "description": "depending on the input 'cat' parameter, this will either return raw value (with HTML) or plain text. Legacy posts are returned as is, they can't be stripped of tags.",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "likes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "dislikes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/forumposts
**Summary:** Get posts for a specific player

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns 20 posts per page for a specific player.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumPosts",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumPosts": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "thread_id",
          "author",
          "is_legacy",
          "is_topic",
          "is_edited",
          "is_pinned",
          "created_time",
          "edited_by",
          "has_quote",
          "quoted_post_id",
          "content",
          "likes",
          "dislikes"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "thread_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "author": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "is_legacy": {
            "description": "Indicates whether post was made using the old formatting engine which doesn't use HTML.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_topic": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_edited": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_pinned": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "created_time": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "edited_by": {
            "description": "'edited_by' is null when 'is_edited' is false.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "has_quote": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "quoted_post_id": {
            "description": "'quoted_post_id' is null when 'has_quote' is false.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "content": {
            "description": "depending on the input 'cat' parameter, this will either return raw value (with HTML) or plain text. Legacy posts are returned as is, they can't be stripped of tags.",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "likes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "dislikes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```
