## [User] GET /user/forumsubscribedthreads
**Summary:** Get updates on threads you subscribed to

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>This selection returns data visible in 'Subscribed Threads' section on forum page. Threads are sorted in the same way as on site.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumSbuscribedThreads"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumSubscribedThreads": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "forum_id",
          "author",
          "title",
          "posts"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "forum_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "author": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "posts": {
            "required": [
              "new",
              "total"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "new": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "total": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/forumthreads
**Summary:** Get your threads

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns 100 threads per page. The field 'new_posts' is also available, indicating the amount of unread posts with a Minimum API key (or higher).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumThreads",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumThreads": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title",
              "forum_id",
              "posts",
              "rating",
              "views",
              "author",
              "last_poster",
              "first_post_time",
              "last_post_time",
              "has_poll",
              "is_locked",
              "is_sticky"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "forum_id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "posts": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "rating": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "views": {
                "description": "Total number of times players have opened this thread.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "author": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "username",
                  "karma"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "username": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "karma": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "last_poster": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "username",
                      "karma"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "username": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "karma": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "first_post_time": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "last_post_time": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "has_poll": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_locked": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_sticky": {
                "type": "boolean"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          {
            "required": [
              "new_posts"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "new_posts": {
                "description": "Available only when requesting data for yourself (no id or your id) with at least 'Minimal' access type key.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/forumthreads
**Summary:** Get threads for a specific player

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns 100 threads per page for a specific player. When requesting data for the key owner, a field 'new_posts' is also available, indicating the amount of unread posts. Minimum API key is required for that.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "forumThreads",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "forumThreads": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title",
              "forum_id",
              "posts",
              "rating",
              "views",
              "author",
              "last_poster",
              "first_post_time",
              "last_post_time",
              "has_poll",
              "is_locked",
              "is_sticky"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "forum_id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "posts": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "rating": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "views": {
                "description": "Total number of times players have opened this thread.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "author": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "username",
                  "karma"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "username": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "karma": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "last_poster": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "username",
                      "karma"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "username": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "karma": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "first_post_time": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "last_post_time": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "has_poll": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_locked": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_sticky": {
                "type": "boolean"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          {
            "required": [
              "new_posts"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "new_posts": {
                "description": "Available only when requesting data for yourself (no id or your id) with at least 'Minimal' access type key.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/honors
**Summary:** Get your achieved honors

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "honors"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "honors": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "timestamp"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/icons
**Summary:** Get your icons information

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> When requesting data for yourself with 'Custom', 'Limited' or 'Full' access keys, the response will be of type UserIconPrivate, otherwise UserIconPublic.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "icons"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "icons": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "allOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "title",
                  "description"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "title": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "description": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "until"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "until": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title",
              "description"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/icons
**Summary:** Get icons information for a specific player

**Description:** Requires public access key.<br> When requesting data for yourself with 'Custom', 'Limited' or 'Full' access keys, the response will be of type UserIconPrivate, otherwise UserIconPublic.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "icons"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "icons": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "allOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "title",
                  "description"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "title": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "description": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "until"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "until": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title",
              "description"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/inventory
**Summary:** Get your inventory

**Description:** <b>Cached selection (1 hour per category).</b><br><br>Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Items category | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "inventory",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "inventory": {
      "required": [
        "items",
        "timestamp"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "items": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "amount",
              "equipped",
              "name",
              "faction_owned",
              "uid"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "amount": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "equipped": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "faction_owned": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "uid": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "total": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/itemmarket
**Summary:** Get your item market listings

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "itemmarket",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "itemmarket": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "price",
          "average_price",
          "amount",
          "is_anonymous",
          "available",
          "item"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "price": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "average_price": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "amount": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_anonymous": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "available": {
            "description": "Amount remaining in the inventory.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "item": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "type",
              "rarity",
              "uid",
              "stats",
              "bonuses"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "type": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "rarity": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "yellow",
                      "orange",
                      "red"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "uid": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "stats": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "damage",
                      "accuracy",
                      "armor",
                      "quality"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "damage": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "accuracy": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "armor": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "quality": {
                        "type": "number",
                        "format": "float"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "bonuses": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "title",
                    "description",
                    "value"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "title": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "description": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "value": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/job
**Summary:** Get your job information

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "job"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "job": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "type",
            "name",
            "position"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "job"
              ]
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Army",
                "Casino",
                "Education",
                "Grocer",
                "Law",
                "Medical"
              ]
            },
            "position": {
              "description": "Position enum corresponds to the name enum.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Private",
                    "Corporal",
                    "Sergeant",
                    "Master Sergeant",
                    "Warrant Officer",
                    "Lieutenant",
                    "Major",
                    "Colonel",
                    "Brigadier",
                    "General"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Bagboy",
                    "Price Labeler",
                    "Cashier",
                    "Food Delivery",
                    "Manager"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Gaming Consultant",
                    "Marketing Manager",
                    "Revenue Manager",
                    "Casino Manager",
                    "Casino President"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Medical Student",
                    "Houseman",
                    "Senior Houseman",
                    "GP",
                    "Consultant",
                    "Surgeon",
                    "Brain Surgeon"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Law Student",
                    "Paralegal",
                    "Probate Lawyer",
                    "Trial Lawyer",
                    "Circuit Court Judge",
                    "Federal Judge"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Recess Supervisor",
                    "Substitute Teacher",
                    "Elementary Teacher",
                    "Secondary Teacher",
                    "Professor",
                    "Vice-Principal",
                    "Principal"
                  ]
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "type",
            "id",
            "type_id",
            "name",
            "rating",
            "position",
            "days_in_company"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "company"
              ]
            },
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "type_id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "rating": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "position": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "days_in_company": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/list
**Summary:** Get your friends, enemies or targets list

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Select list type | Yes | string |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sort rows from newest to oldest<br>Default ordering is ascending | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "list",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "list": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "level",
          "faction_id",
          "last_action",
          "status"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "faction_id": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "last_action": {
            "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
            "required": [
              "status",
              "timestamp",
              "relative"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Online",
                  "Idle",
                  "Offline"
                ]
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "relative": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "status": {
            "description": "Details about a user's status.",
            "required": [
              "description",
              "details",
              "state",
              "until",
              "color"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "details": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "state": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Abroad",
                      "Awoken",
                      "Dormant",
                      "Fallen",
                      "Federal",
                      "Hospital",
                      "Jail",
                      "Okay",
                      "Traveling"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "color": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "until": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "plane_image_type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "private_jet",
                  "light_aircraft",
                  "airliner"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/log
**Summary:** Get your logs

**Description:** Requires full access key. <br> It's possible to pass a list of log ids or a log category id.<br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| log | query | Log ids, comma separated, e.g. 105,4900,4905 | No | array |
| cat | query | Log category id | No | integer |
| target | query | Get logs where you interacted with a specific player by passing their player ID. | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Full).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "log",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "log": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "timestamp",
          "details",
          "data",
          "params"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "details": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title",
              "category"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "category": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "data": {
            "description": "Dynamic key-value pairs related to the log.",
            "type": "object"
          },
          "params": {
            "description": "Dynamic key-value pairs related to the log.",
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/medals
**Summary:** Get your achieved medals

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "medals"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "medals": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "timestamp"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/merits
**Summary:** Get your merits

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "merits"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "merits": {
      "required": [
        "upgrades",
        "available",
        "used",
        "medals",
        "honors"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "upgrades": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "level"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "available": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "used": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "medals": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "honors": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/messages
**Summary:** Get your messages

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "messages",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "messages": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "sender",
          "timestamp",
          "topic",
          "type",
          "seen",
          "read"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "sender": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "topic": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Company newsletter",
              "Faction newsletter",
              "Warning",
              "User message"
            ]
          },
          "seen": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "read": {
            "type": "boolean"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/missions
**Summary:** Get your current missions information

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "missions"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "missions": {
      "required": [
        "credits",
        "givers",
        "rewards"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "credits": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "givers": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "contracts"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "contracts": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "title",
                    "difficulty",
                    "status",
                    "created_at",
                    "started_at",
                    "expires_at",
                    "completed_at",
                    "rewards"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "title": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "difficulty": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "Very easy",
                        "Easy",
                        "Medium",
                        "Hard",
                        "Very hard",
                        "Expert"
                      ]
                    },
                    "status": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "Accepted",
                        "Available",
                        "Failed",
                        "Completed"
                      ]
                    },
                    "created_at": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "started_at": {
                      "description": "Null if the status is 'Available'.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    "expires_at": {
                      "description": "Null if the status is not 'Accepted'.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    "completed_at": {
                      "description": "Null if the status is not 'Failed' or 'Completed'.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    "rewards": {
                      "description": "Null if the status is not 'Completed'.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "required": [
                            "money",
                            "credits"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "money": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "credits": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "rewards": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "type",
              "details",
              "amount",
              "cost",
              "expires_at"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Item",
                  "Ammo",
                  "Upgrade"
                ]
              },
              "details": {
                "description": "The response depends on the 'type' value.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "type"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "type": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "Standard",
                          "Hollow Point",
                          "Piercing",
                          "Tracer",
                          "Incendiary"
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "type",
                      "sub_type"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "type": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "Alcohol",
                          "Armor",
                          "Artifact",
                          "Book",
                          "Booster",
                          "Candy",
                          "Car",
                          "Clothing",
                          "Collectible",
                          "Drug",
                          "Energy Drink",
                          "Enhancer",
                          "Flower",
                          "Jewelry",
                          "Material",
                          "Medical",
                          "Other",
                          "Plushie",
                          "Special",
                          "Supply Pack",
                          "Tool",
                          "Unused",
                          "Weapon"
                        ]
                      },
                      "sub_type": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "Heavy artillery",
                              "Machine gun",
                              "Pistol",
                              "Rifle",
                              "Shotgun",
                              "SMG",
                              "Temporary",
                              "Clubbing",
                              "Piercing",
                              "Slashing",
                              "Mechanical"
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "amount": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "cost": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "expires_at": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/money
**Summary:** Get your current wealth

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "money"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "money": {
      "required": [
        "points",
        "wallet",
        "company",
        "vault",
        "cayman_bank",
        "city_bank",
        "faction",
        "daily_networth"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "points": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        },
        "wallet": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        },
        "company": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        },
        "vault": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        },
        "cayman_bank": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        },
        "city_bank": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "amount",
                "profit",
                "duration",
                "interest_rate",
                "until",
                "invested_at"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "amount": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "profit": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "duration": {
                  "description": "Initial duration in days.",
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "interest_rate": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "format": "float"
                },
                "until": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "invested_at": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "faction": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "money",
                "points"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "money": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "points": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "daily_networth": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [User] GET /user/newevents
**Summary:** Get your unseen events

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "events"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "events": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "timestamp",
          "event"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "event": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---
