## [User] GET /user/organizedcrime
**Summary:** Get your current ongoing organized crime

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "organizedCrime"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "organizedCrime": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name",
            "previous_crime_id",
            "difficulty",
            "status",
            "created_at",
            "planning_at",
            "ready_at",
            "expired_at",
            "executed_at",
            "slots",
            "rewards"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "previous_crime_id": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "difficulty": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "status": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Recruiting",
                "Planning",
                "Successful",
                "Failure",
                "Expired"
              ]
            },
            "created_at": {
              "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was created.",
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "planning_at": {
              "description": "The timestamp at which the planning phase for the crime has begun.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "ready_at": {
              "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will be ready.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "expired_at": {
              "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will expire.",
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "executed_at": {
              "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was executed. <br> Note: this value is null for all crimes executed before January 15th, 2025.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "slots": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "position",
                  "position_info",
                  "item_requirement",
                  "user",
                  "checkpoint_pass_rate"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "position": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "position_info": {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "label",
                      "number"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "P1",
                          "P2",
                          "P3",
                          "P4",
                          "P5",
                          "P6"
                        ]
                      },
                      "label": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "number": {
                        "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32",
                        "deprecated": true
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "position_id": {
                    "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "P1",
                      "P2",
                      "P3",
                      "P4",
                      "P5",
                      "P6"
                    ],
                    "deprecated": true
                  },
                  "position_number": {
                    "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'number' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32",
                    "deprecated": true
                  },
                  "item_requirement": {
                    "description": "Details of item required for the slot, if applicable.",
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "is_reusable",
                          "is_available"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          "is_reusable": {
                            "description": "Shows if the item is reusable or consumed during the crime.<br><b>Important note: There may be alternative paths which won't consume the item, even if the item is non-reusable.</b>",
                            "type": "boolean"
                          },
                          "is_available": {
                            "description": "Shows if user has the required item.",
                            "type": "boolean"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "user": {
                    "description": "Details about the user joined the slot, if any.",
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "outcome",
                          "joined_at",
                          "progress",
                          "item_outcome"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "outcome": {
                            "description": "This field will be null for old crimes.",
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "Successful",
                                  "Failed",
                                  "Jailed",
                                  "Injured",
                                  "Hospitalized"
                                ]
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "outcome_duration": {
                            "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the outcome is 'Jailed' or 'Hospitalized'.",
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "item_outcome": {
                            "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the item was used or lost.",
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "required": [
                                  "owned_by",
                                  "item_id",
                                  "item_uid",
                                  "outcome"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                  "owned_by": {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "enum": [
                                      "user",
                                      "faction"
                                    ]
                                  },
                                  "item_id": {
                                    "type": "integer",
                                    "format": "int64"
                                  },
                                  "item_uid": {
                                    "type": "integer",
                                    "format": "int64"
                                  },
                                  "outcome": {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "enum": [
                                      "lost",
                                      "used"
                                    ]
                                  }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "joined_at": {
                            "description": "The timestamp at which the user joined the slot.",
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "progress": {
                            "description": "Current planning progress on the slot.",
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "checkpoint_pass_rate": {
                    "description": "Returns CPR for the player who joined the slot. If the slot is empty (availalbe), it shows your CPR for that slot. This value is 0 for expired crimes.",
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "rewards": {
              "description": "Details about the crime rewards. Available only for crimes with 'Successful' status.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "money",
                    "items",
                    "respect",
                    "payout",
                    "scope"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "money": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "items": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "quantity"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          "quantity": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    },
                    "respect": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "scope": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "payout": {
                      "description": "Details about the crime payouts. This field is null if the crime has not been paid via the automatic payouts system.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "required": [
                            "type",
                            "percentage",
                            "paid_by",
                            "paid_at"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "type": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "enum": [
                                "balance",
                                "wallet",
                                "inventory"
                              ]
                            },
                            "percentage": {
                              "description": "Total percentage split between all participants.",
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            "paid_by": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "paid_at": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "code",
            "error"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "code": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32",
              "enum": [
                27
              ]
            },
            "error": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/organizedcrimes
**Summary:** Get available slots for organized crimes with status 'Recruiting'

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>Unlike 'faction' -> 'crimes', this selection only shows empty slots, and only for crimes with the 'Recruiting' status.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

## [User] GET /user/personalstats
**Summary:** Get your personal stats

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>
 * UserPersonalStatsFull is returned only when this selection is requested with Limited, Full or Custom key access key.
 * UserPersonalStatsFullPublic is returned when the requested category is 'all'.
 * UserPersonalStatsPopular is returned when the requested category is 'popular'. Please try to use UserPersonalStatsPopular over UserPersonalStatsFullPublic wherever possible in order to reduce the server load.
 * Otherwise, UserPersonalStatsCategory is returned for the matched category.
 * Historical stats can be fetched via 'stat' query parameter. It's only possible to pass up to 10 historical stats at once (the rest is trimmed). When requesting historical stats the response will be of type UserPersonalStatsHistoric.
 * Use 'timestamp' query parameter to get historical stats at the certain point in time. It's possible some historical stats didn't exist at the given timestamp, and for such stats you will not receive anything back.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Stats category. Required unless requesting specific stats via 'stat' query parameter | No | string |
| stat | query | Stat names (10 maximum). Used to fetch historical stat values | No | array |
| timestamp | query | Returns stats until this timestamp (converted to nearest date). | No | integer |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "oneOf": [
    {
      "required": [
        "personalstats"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "personalstats": {
          "allOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "attacking"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "attacking": {
                  "required": [
                    "attacks",
                    "defends",
                    "elo",
                    "unarmored_wins",
                    "highest_level_beaten",
                    "escapes",
                    "killstreak",
                    "hits",
                    "damage",
                    "networth",
                    "ammunition",
                    "faction"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "attacks": {
                      "required": [
                        "won",
                        "lost",
                        "stalemate",
                        "assist",
                        "stealth"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "won": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "lost": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "stalemate": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "assist": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "stealth": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "defends": {
                      "required": [
                        "won",
                        "lost",
                        "stalemate",
                        "total"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "won": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "lost": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "stalemate": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "total": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "elo": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "unarmored_wins": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "highest_level_beaten": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "escapes": {
                      "required": [
                        "player",
                        "foes"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "player": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "foes": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "killstreak": {
                      "required": [
                        "best",
                        "current"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "best": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "current": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "hits": {
                      "required": [

```

---

## [User] GET /user/{id}/personalstats
**Summary:** Get a player's personal stats

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>
 *  UserPersonalStatsFull is returned only when this selection is requested for the key owner with Limited, Full or Custom key.
 *  UserPersonalStatsFullPublic is returned when the requested category is 'all'.
 *  UserPersonalStatsPopular is returned when the requested category is 'popular'. Please try to use UserPersonalStatsPopular over UserPersonalStatsFullPublic wherever possible in order to reduce the server load.
 *  Otherwise, UserPersonalStatsCategory is returned for the matched category.
 *  It's possible to request specific stats via 'stat' parameter. In this case the response will vary depending on the stats requested. Private stats are still available only to the key owner (with Limited or higher key).
 *  Additionally, historical stats can also be fetched via 'stat' query parameter, but 'timestamp' parameter must be provided as well. It's only possible to pass up to 10 historical stats at once (the rest is trimmed). When requesting historical stats the response will be of type UserPersonalStatsHistoric.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| cat | query |  | No | string |
| stat | query | Stat names (10 maximum). Used to fetch historical stat values | No | array |
| timestamp | query | Returns stats until this timestamp (converted to nearest date). | No | integer |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

## [User] GET /user/profile
**Summary:** Get your own profile

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "profile"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "profile": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name",
        "level",
        "rank",
        "title",
        "age",
        "signed_up",
        "faction_id",
        "honor_id",
        "property",
        "image",
        "gender",
        "revivable",
        "role",
        "status",
        "spouse",
        "awards",
        "friends",
        "enemies",
        "forum_posts",
        "karma",
        "last_action",
        "life",
        "donator_status"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "level": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "rank": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Absolute beginner",
                "Beginner",
                "Inexperienced",
                "Rookie",
                "Novice",
                "Below average",
                "Average",
                "Reasonable",
                "Above average",
                "Competent",
                "Highly competent",
                "Veteran",
                "Distinguished",
                "Highly distinguished",
                "Professional",
                "Star",
                "Master",
                "Outstanding",
                "Celebrity",
                "Supreme",
                "Idolized",
                "Champion",
                "Heroic",
                "Legendary",
                "Elite",
                "Invincible"
              ]
            },
            {
              "type": "string"
            }
          ]
        },
        "title": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Alcoholic",
                "Sharpshooter",
                "Accomplice",
                "Loser",
                "Silent Killer",
                "Killer",
                "Merchant",
                "Medalist",
                "Tycoon",
                "Damage Dealer",
                "Slayer",
                "Hired Gun",
                "Egotist",
                "Outcast",
                "Punchbag",
                "Tank",
                "Antagonist",
                "Druggy",
                "Scavenger",
                "Boxer",
                "Importer",
                "Looter",
                "Samaritan",
                "Felon",
                "Socialite",
                "Mercenary",
                "Investor",
                "Thief",
                "One Hit Killer",
                "Mobster",
                "Addict",
                "Bonds Agent",
                "Buster",
                "Hoarder",
                "Racer",
                "Soldier",
                "Avenger",
                "Healer",
                "Booster",
                "Intimidator",
                "Trader",
                "Jobsworth",
                "Tourist",
                "Nudist",
                "Sage",
                "Coward",
                "Newcomer",
                "Deserter",
                "Citizen"
              ]
            },
            {
              "type": "string"
            }
          ]
        },
        "donator_status": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Donator",
                "Subscriber"
              ]
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "age": {
          "description": "Age in days.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "signed_up": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "faction_id": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "honor_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "property": {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "image": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "gender": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "Male",
            "Female",
            "Enby"
          ]
        },
        "revivable": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "role": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "Admin",
            "Officer",
            "Moderator",
            "Helper",
            "Tester",
            "NPC",
            "Committee",
            "Reporter",
            "Wiki Contributor",
            "Wiki Editor",
            "Civilian"
          ]
        },
        "status": {
          "description": "Details about a user's status.",
          "required": [
            "description",
            "details",
            "state",
            "until",
            "color"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "description": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "details": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "state": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Abroad",
                    "Awoken",
                    "Dormant",
                    "Fallen",
                    "Federal",
                    "Hospital",
                    "Jail",
                    "Okay",
                    "Traveling"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              ]
            },
            "color": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "until": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "plane_image_type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "private_jet",
                "light_aircraft",
                "airliner"
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "spouse": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "description": "The property 'days_married' is not present if the status is 'Engaged'",
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name",
                "status"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "status": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Engaged",
                    "Newlywed",
                    "Married"
                  ]
                },
                "days_married": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "awards": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "friends": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "enemies": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "forum_posts": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "karma": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "last_action": {
          "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
          "required": [
            "status",
            "timestamp",
            "relative"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "status": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Online",
                "Idle",
                "Offline"
              ]
            },
            "timestamp": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "relative": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "life": {
          "required": [
            "current",
            "maximum"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "current": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "maximum": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/{id}/profile
**Summary:** Get profile information for a specific player

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "profile"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "profile": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name",
        "level",
        "rank",
        "title",
        "age",
        "signed_up",

```

---

## [User] GET /user/properties
**Summary:** Get your own properties

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Extended responses are available when requesting the data with Limited or higher access keys.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to filter properties by the key owner or their spouse. | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

## [User] GET /user/{id}/properties
**Summary:** Get specific user's properties

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Extended responses are available when requesting the data with Limited or higher access keys for yourself or your spouse.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to filter properties by the key owner or their spouse. | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

## [User] GET /user/property
**Summary:** Get your current property

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "property"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "property": {
      "allOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "owner",
            "property",
            "happy",
            "upkeep",
            "market_price",
            "modifications",
            "staff"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "owner": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "property": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "happy": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "upkeep": {
              "required": [
                "property",
                "staff"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "property": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "staff": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "market_price": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "modifications": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Hot Tub",
                  "Sauna",
                  "Open Bar",
                  "Small Pool",
                  "Medium Pool",
                  "Large Pool",
                  "Small Vault",
                  "Medium Vault",
                  "Large Vault",
                  "Extra Large Vault",
                  "Medical Facility",
                  "Advanced Shooting Range",
                  "Airstrip",
                  "Private Yacht",
                  "Sufficient Interior Modification",
                  "Superior Interior Modification"
                ]
              }
            },
            "staff": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "type",
                  "amount"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Maid",
                      "Guard",
                      "Doctor",
                      "Pilot",
                      "Butler"
                    ]
                  },
                  "amount": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "used_by"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "used_by": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/{id}/property
**Summary:** Get specific user's property

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | User id or user discord id | Yes | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

## [User] GET /user/races
**Summary:** Get user races

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>Returns a list of user races, ordered by race start timestamp.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| cat | query | Category of races returned | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "races",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "races": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "allOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "title",
                  "track_id",
                  "creator_id",
                  "status",
                  "laps",
                  "participants",
                  "schedule",
                  "requirements",
                  "is_official"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "title": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "track_id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "creator_id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "status": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "open",
                      "in_progress",
                      "finished"
                    ]
                  },
                  "laps": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "participants": {
                    "required": [
                      "minimum",
                      "maximum",
                      "current"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "minimum": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "maximum": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "current": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "schedule": {
                    "required": [
                      "join_from",
                      "join_until",
                      "start",
                      "end"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "join_from": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "join_until": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "start": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "end": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "requirements": {
                    "required": [
                      "car_class",
                      "driver_class",
                      "car_item_id",
                      "requires_stock_car",
                      "requires_password",
                      "join_fee"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "car_class": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "A",
                              "B",
                              "C",
                              "D",
                              "E"
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "driver_class": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "A",
                              "B",
                              "C",
                              "D",
                              "E"
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "car_item_id": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "requires_stock_car": {
                        "type": "boolean"
                      },
                      "requires_password": {
                        "type": "boolean"
                      },
                      "join_fee": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "is_official": {
                    "type": "boolean"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "is_official",
                  "results"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "results": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "driver_id",
                        "position",
                        "car_id",
                        "car_item_id",
                        "car_item_name",
                        "car_class",
                        "has_crashed",
                        "best_lap_time",
                        "race_time",
                        "time_ended"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "driver_id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "position": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "car_id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "car_item_id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        },
                        "car_item_name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "car_class": {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "A",
                            "B",
                            "C",
                            "D",
                            "E"
                          ]
                        },
                        "has_crashed": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "boolean"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "best_lap_time": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "race_time": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "time_ended": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "is_official": {
                    "type": "boolean"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "required": [
              "skill_gain"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "skill_gain": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/racingrecords
**Summary:** Get your current racing records

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "racingrecords"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "racingrecords": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "track",
          "records"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "track": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "records": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "car_id",
                "car_name",
                "lap_time"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "car_id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "car_name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "lap_time": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/refills
**Summary:** Get your refills information

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "refills"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "refills": {
      "required": [
        "energy",
        "nerve",
        "token",
        "special_count"
      ],
      "properties": {

          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "nerve": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "token": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "special_count": {

          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/reports
**Summary:** Get your reports

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>
The limit is set to 25 when requesting any category other than 'stats'.<br>
When requesting the 'stats' category, limit can be increased up to 100.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Used to filter reports with a specific type. | No | string |
| target | query | Get reports for a specific player by passing their player ID. | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "reports",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "reports": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "required": [
              "type",
              "target_id",
              "reporter_id",
              "faction_id",
              "timestamp"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "mostwanted",
                  "money",
                  "stats",
                  "references",
                  "friendorfoe",
                  "companyfinancials",
                  "truelevel",
                  "stockanalysis",
                  "anonymousbounties",
                  "investment"
                ]
              },
              "target_id": {
                "description": "The target ID if applicable.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "reporter_id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "faction_id": {
                "description": "Reporter's faction ID if applicable.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          {
            "required": [
              "report"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "report": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "money"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "money": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "strength",
                      "speed",
                      "dexterity",
                      "defense",
                      "total"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "strength": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "speed": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "dexterity": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "defense": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "total": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "top",
                      "notable"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "top": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "name",
                            "warrant"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "name": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "warrant": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "notable": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "name",
                            "warrant"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "name": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "warrant": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "factions",
                      "companies"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "factions": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "name",
                            "joined",
                            "left"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "name": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "joined": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "format": "date"
                            },
                            "left": {
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "format": "date"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "companies": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "name",
                            "joined",
                            "left"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "name": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "joined": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "format": "date"
                            },
                            "left": {
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "format": "date"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "friends",
                      "enemies"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "friends": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "name"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "name": {
                              "type": "string"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "enemies": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "name"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "name": {
                              "type": "string"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "balance",
                      "employees",
                      "wages"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "balance": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "employees": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "wages": {
                        "required": [
                          "highest",
                          "lowest",
                          "average"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "highest": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "lowest": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "average": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "level"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "level": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "items"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "items": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "country",
                            "item",
                            "trip_duration",
                            "hourly_profit"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "country": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "enum": [
                                "Mexico",
                                "Hawaii",
                                "South Africa",
                                "Japan",
                                "China",
                                "Argentina",
                                "Switzerland",
                                "Canada",
                                "United Kingdom",
                                "UAE",
                                "Cayman Islands",
                                "Torn"
                              ]
                            },
                            "item": {
                              "required": [
                                "id",
                                "name",
                                "stock",
                                "price",
                                "value",
                                "due"
                              ],
                              "properties": {
                                "id": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int64"
                                },
                                "name": {
                                  "type": "string"
                                },
                                "price": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int32"
                                },
                                "value": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int32"
                                },
                                "due": {
                                  "oneOf": [
                                    {
                                      "type": "integer",
                                      "format": "int32"
                                    },
                                    {
                                      "type": "null"
                                    }
                                  ]
                                }
                              },
                              "type": "object"
                            },
                            "trip_duration": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "hourly_profit": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "bounties"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "bounties": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "bounty",
                            "user",
                            "text"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "text": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "bounty": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int64"
                            },
                            "user": {
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "required": [
                                    "id",
                                    "name"
                                  ],
                                  "properties": {
                                    "id": {
                                      "type": "integer",
                                      "format": "int32"
                                    },
                                    "name": {
                                      "type": "string"
                                    }
                                  },
                                  "type": "object"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "amount",
                      "until"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "amount": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "until": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```
