## [User] GET /user/revives
**Summary:** Get your detailed revives

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "revives",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "revives": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "reviver",
          "target",
          "success_chance",
          "result",
          "timestamp"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "reviver": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "faction",
              "skill"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "faction": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "skill": {
                "description": "Entries before 16/06/2025 will have this field set as null.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "number",
                    "format": "float"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "target": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "faction",
              "hospital_reason",
              "early_discharge",
              "last_action",
              "online_status"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "faction": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "hospital_reason": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "early_discharge": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "last_action": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "online_status": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "success_chance": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "result": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |

```json
                  },

                  }
                ]

              "hospital_reason": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "early_discharge": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "last_action": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "online_status": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "success_chance": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },

            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
```

## [User] GET /user/skills
**Summary:** Get your skills

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "skills"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "skills": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "slug",
          "name",
          "level"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "slug": {
            "type": "string",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "hunting",
                  "racing",
                  "reviving",
                  "search_for_cash",
                  "bootlegging",
                  "graffiti",
                  "shoplifting",
                  "pickpocketing",
                  "card_skimming",
                  "burglary",
                  "hustling",
                  "disposal",
                  "cracking",
                  "forgery",
                  "scamming",
                  "arson"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "string"
              }
            ]
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "level": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/stocks
**Summary:** Get your stocks

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "stocks"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "stocks": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "shares",
          "bonus",
          "transactions"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "shares": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "transactions": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "shares",
                "price",
                "timestamp"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "shares": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "price": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "timestamp": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "bonus": {
            "required": [
              "available",
              "increment",
              "progress",
              "frequency"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "available": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "increment": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "progress": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "frequency": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/trades
**Summary:** Get your trades

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br> When requesting 'ongoing' trades (default), limit/offset/sort are not being used.

| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |

| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |

```json
                  "type": "string"

  "type": "object"
```

## [User] GET /user/{tradeId}/trade
**Summary:** Get your detailed trade

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>Only possible to get trades you participated in.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| tradeId | path | Trade id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "trade"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "trade": {
      "allOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "timestamp",
            "user",
            "trader",
            "items"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "timestamp": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "user": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "trader": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
```

## [User] GET /user/travel
**Summary:** Get your travel information

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "travel"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "travel": {
      "required": [
        "destination",
        "method",
        "departed_at",
        "arrival_at",
        "time_left"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "destination": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "Mexico",
            "Hawaii",
            "South Africa",
            "Japan",
            "China",
            "Argentina",
            "Switzerland",
            "Canada",
            "United Kingdom",
            "UAE",
            "Cayman Islands",
            "Torn"
          ]
        },
        "method": {
          "description": "Null if the player has never flown before.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Private",
                "Business",
                "Airstrip",
                "Standard"
              ]
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "departed_at": {
          "description": "Null if the player has never flown before.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "arrival_at": {
          "description": "Null if the player has never flown before.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "time_left": {
          "description": "Time left in seconds.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [User] GET /user/virus
**Summary:** Get your virus coding information

**Description:** Requires minimal access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "virus"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "virus": {
      "description": "Null if the player is currently not programming a virus.",
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "item",
            "until"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "item": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "until": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |

| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
    "selections"

    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [

            "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'bazaar','criminalrecord','display','gym','networth','perks'.",

              "merits",

              "missions",
```

## [User] GET /user
**Summary:** Get any User selection

**Description:** Key access level depends on the required selections. <br>Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | {"oneOf":[{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"string"}]},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},{"type":"string"}]} |
| legacy | query | Legacy selection names for which you want or expect API v1 response | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| cat | query | Selection category. Can belong to one of the specified types. | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["mostwanted","money","stats","references","friendorfoe","companyfinancials","truelevel","stockanalysis","anonymousbounties","investment"]},{"type":"string","enum":["Friends","Enemies","Targets"]},{"type":"string","enum":["all","popular","attacking","battle_stats","jobs","trading","jail","hospital","finishing_hits","communication","crimes","bounties","investments","items","travel","drugs","missions","racing","networth","other","itemmarketcustomers","itemmarketsales","itemmarketrevenue","itemmarketfees"]},{"type":"string","enum":["official","custom"]},{"type":"string","enum":["Collectible","Clothing","Other","Tool","Melee","Defensive","Material","Car","Primary","Secondary","Book","Special","Supply Pack","Temporary","Enhancer","Artifact","Flower","Booster","Medical","Candy","Jewelry","Alcohol","Plushie","Drug","Energy Drink"]},{"type":"string","default":"ongoing","enum":["finished","ongoing"]}]} |
| stat | query | Selection stat | No | array |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives. | No | string |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "anyOf": [
    {
      "required": [
        "crimes"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "crimes": {
          "required": [
            "nerve_spent",
            "skill",
            "progression_bonus",
            "rewards",
            "attempts",
            "uniques",
            "miscellaneous"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "nerve_spent": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "skill": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "progression_bonus": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "rewards": {
              "required": [
                "money",
                "ammo",
                "items"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "money": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "ammo": {
                  "required": [
                    "standard",
                    "special"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "standard": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "special": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "items": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "amount"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "amount": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "attempts": {
              "required": [
                "total",
                "success",
                "fail",
                "critical_fail",
                "subcrimes"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "total": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "success": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "fail": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "critical_fail": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "subcrimes": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "total",
                      "success",
                      "fail"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "total": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "success": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "fail": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "uniques": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "rewards"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "description": "Unique result id.",
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "rewards": {
                    "required": [
                      "items",
                      "money",
                      "ammo"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "items": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "amount"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "amount": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "money": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "min",
                              "max"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "min": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "max": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "ammo": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "amount",
                              "type"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "amount": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "type": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "standard",
                                  "special"
                                ]
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "miscellaneous": {
              "description": " Miscellaneous stats for specific crime. Results differ based on the cat id.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "online_store",
                    "dvd_sales",
                    "dvd_copies"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "online_store": {
                      "description": "Online store statistics.",
                      "required": [
                        "earnings",
                        "visits",
                        "customers",
                        "sales"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "earnings": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "visits": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "customers": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "sales": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "dvd_sales": {
                      "description": "DVD sales statistics.",
                      "required": [
                        "action",
                        "comedy",
                        "drama",
                        "fantasy",
                        "horror",
                        "romance",
                        "thriller",
                        "sci_fi",
                        "total",
                        "earnings"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "action": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "comedy": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "drama": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },

                          "type": "integer",

                        },

                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "romance": {

                        },

                          "format": "int32"
                        },

                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "total": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "earnings": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "dvds_copied": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"

              },
              "thread_id": {
                "type": "integer",

                "required": [

                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "username": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "karma": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "is_legacy": {
                "description": "Indicates whether post was made using the old formatting engine which doesn't use HTML.",
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_topic": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_edited": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_pinned": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "created_time": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "edited_by": {
                "description": "'edited_by' is null when 'is_edited' is false.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "has_quote": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "quoted_post_id": {
                "description": "'quoted_post_id' is null when 'has_quote' is false.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "content": {
                "description": "depending on the input 'cat' parameter, this will either return raw value (with HTML) or plain text. Legacy posts are returned as is, they can't be stripped of tags.",
                "type": "string"
              },
              "likes": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "dislikes": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }

                "description": "This represents the type of the activity. Values range from 1 to 8 where:\n *                    1 = 'X posted on a thread',\n *                    2 = 'X created a thread',\n *                    3 = 'X liked your thread',\n *                    4 = 'X disliked your thread',\n *                    5 = 'X liked your post',\n *                    6 = 'X disliked your post',\n *                    7 = 'X quoted your post'.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32",
                "enum": [
                  1,
                  2,
                  3,
                  4,
                  5,
                  6,
                  7
                ]

    {
      "required": [
        "organizedCrime"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "organizedCrime": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name",
                "previous_crime_id",
                "difficulty",
                "status",
                "created_at",
                "planning_at",
                "ready_at",
                "expired_at",
                "executed_at",
                "slots",
                "rewards"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "previous_crime_id": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int64"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "difficulty": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "status": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Recruiting",
                    "Planning",
                    "Successful",
                    "Failure",
                    "Expired"
                  ]
                },
                "created_at": {
                  "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was created.",
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "planning_at": {
                  "description": "The timestamp at which the planning phase for the crime has begun.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "ready_at": {
                  "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will be ready.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "expired_at": {
                  "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will expire.",
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "executed_at": {
                  "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was executed. <br> Note: this value is null for all crimes executed before January 15th, 2025.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "slots": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "position",
                      "position_info",
                      "item_requirement",
                      "user",
                      "checkpoint_pass_rate"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "position": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "position_info": {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "label",
                          "number"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "P1",
                              "P2",
                              "P3",
                              "P4",
                              "P5",
                              "P6"
                            ]
                          },
                          "label": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "number": {
                            "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32",
                            "deprecated": true
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      "position_id": {
                        "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "P1",
                          "P2",
                          "P3",
                          "P4",
                          "P5",
                          "P6"
                        ],
                        "deprecated": true
                      },
                      "position_number": {
                        "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'number' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32",
                        "deprecated": true
                      },
                      "item_requirement": {
                        "description": "Details of item required for the slot, if applicable.",
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "id",
                              "is_reusable",
                              "is_available"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "id": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int64"
                              },
                              "is_reusable": {
                                "description": "Shows if the item is reusable or consumed during the crime.<br><b>Important note: There may be alternative paths which won't consume the item, even if the item is non-reusable.</b>",
                                "type": "boolean"
                              },
                              "is_available": {
                                "description": "Shows if user has the required item.",
                                "type": "boolean"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "user": {
                        "description": "Details about the user joined the slot, if any.",
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "id",
                              "outcome",
                              "joined_at",
                              "progress",
                              "item_outcome"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "id": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "outcome": {
                                "description": "This field will be null for old crimes.",
                                "oneOf": [
                                  {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "enum": [
                                      "Successful",
                                      "Failed",
                                      "Jailed",
                                      "Injured",
                                      "Hospitalized"
                                    ]
                                  },
                                  {
                                    "type": "null"
                                  }
                                ]
                              },
                              "outcome_duration": {
                                "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the outcome is 'Jailed' or 'Hospitalized'.",
                                "oneOf": [
                                  {
                                    "type": "integer",
                                    "format": "int32"
                                  },
                                  {
                                    "type": "null"
                                  }
                                ]
                              },
                              "item_outcome": {
                                "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the item was used or lost.",
                                "oneOf": [
                                  {
                                    "required": [
                                      "owned_by",
                                      "item_id",
                                      "item_uid",
                                      "outcome"
                                    ],
                                    "properties": {
                                      "owned_by": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "enum": [
                                          "user",
                                          "faction"
                                        ]
                                      },
                                      "item_id": {
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "format": "int64"
                                      },
                                      "item_uid": {
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "format": "int64"
                                      },
                                      "outcome": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "enum": [
                                          "lost",
                                          "used"
                                        ]
                                      }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                  },
                                  {
                                    "type": "null"
                                  }
                                ]
                              },
                              "joined_at": {
                                "description": "The timestamp at which the user joined the slot.",
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "progress": {
                                "description": "Current planning progress on the slot.",
                                "type": "number",
                                "format": "float"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "checkpoint_pass_rate": {
                        "description": "Returns CPR for the player who joined the slot. If the slot is empty (availalbe), it shows your CPR for that slot. This value is 0 for expired crimes.",
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                },
                "rewards": {
                  "description": "Details about the crime rewards. Available only for crimes with 'Successful' status.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "required": [
                        "money",
                        "items",
                        "respect",
                        "payout",
                        "scope"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "money": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "items": {
                          "type": "array",
                          "items": {
                            "required": [
                              "id",
                              "quantity"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "id": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int64"
                              },
                              "quantity": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          }
                        },
                        "respect": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "scope": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "payout": {
                          "description": "Details about the crime payouts. This field is null if the crime has not been paid via the automatic payouts system.",
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "required": [
                                "type",
                                "percentage",
                                "paid_by",
                                "paid_at"
                              ],
                              "properties": {
                                "type": {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "enum": [
                                    "balance",
                                    "wallet",
                                    "inventory"
                                  ]
                                },
                                "percentage": {
                                  "description": "Total percentage split between all participants.",
                                  "type": "number",
                                  "format": "float"
                                },
                                "paid_by": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int32"
                                },
                                "paid_at": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int32"
                                }
                              },
                              "type": "object"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "required": [
                "code",
                "error"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "code": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32",
                  "enum": [
                    27
                  ]
                },
                "error": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "itemmods"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "itemmods": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [

              "equipped",

            "properties": {

    {
      "required": [
        "attacks",
        "_metadata"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "attacks": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "code",
              "started",
              "ended",
              "attacker",
              "defender",
              "result",
              "respect_gain",
              "respect_loss",
              "chain",
              "is_interrupted",
              "is_stealthed",
              "is_raid",
              "is_ranked_war",
              "finishing_hit_effects",
              "modifiers"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "code": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "started": {
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/applications
**Summary:** Get your faction's applications

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "applications"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "applications": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "user",
          "message",
          "valid_until",
          "status"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "description": "application id",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "user": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "level",
              "stats"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "stats": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "strength",
                      "speed",
                      "dexterity",
                      "defense"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "strength": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "speed": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "dexterity": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "defense": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "message": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "valid_until": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "accepted",
              "declined",
              "withdrawn",
              "active"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/attacks
**Summary:** Get your faction's detailed attacks

**Description:** Requires limited access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "attacks",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "attacks": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "code",
          "started",
          "ended",
          "attacker",
          "defender",
          "result",
          "respect_gain",
          "respect_loss",
          "chain",
          "is_interrupted",
          "is_stealthed",
          "is_raid",
          "is_ranked_war",
          "finishing_hit_effects",
          "modifiers"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "code": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "started": {
            "description": "Attack start timestamp.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "ended": {
            "description": "Attack end timestamp.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "attacker": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "level",
                  "faction"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "level": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "faction": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "name"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "name": {
                            "type": "string"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "defender": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "level",
              "faction"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "faction": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "result": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "None",
              "Attacked",
              "Mugged",
              "Hospitalized",
              "Arrested",
              "Looted",
              "Lost",
              "Stalemate",
              "Assist",
              "Escape",
              "Timeout",
              "Special",
              "Bounty",
              "Interrupted"
            ]
          },
          "respect_gain": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "respect_loss": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "chain": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_interrupted": {
            "description": "This is an experimental flag which should help determine 'assist' attacks which have not contributed to the chain. For example, attacks such as where the opponent lost to someoene else before the attacker could finish the attack. This flag might not work entirely correctly, so use with caution.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_stealthed": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_raid": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_ranked_war": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "finishing_hit_effects": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "name",
                "value"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "name": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "proficience",
                    "stricken",
                    "revitalize",
                    "warlord",
                    "plunder",
                    "irradiate"
                  ]
                },
                "value": {
                  "description": "Advanced weapon bonus value in percentage.",
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "modifiers": {
            "required": [
              "fair_fight",
              "war",
              "retaliation",
              "group",
              "overseas",
              "chain",
              "warlord"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "fair_fight": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "war": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "retaliation": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "group": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "overseas": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "chain": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "warlord": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/attacksfull
**Summary:** Get your faction's simplified attacks

**Description:** Requires limited access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "attacks",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "attacks": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "code",
          "started",
          "ended",
          "attacker",
          "defender",
          "result",
          "respect_gain",
          "respect_loss"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "code": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "started": {
            "description": "Attack start timestamp.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "ended": {
            "description": "Attack end timestamp.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "attacker": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "faction_id"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "faction_id": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "defender": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "faction_id"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "faction_id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "result": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "None",
              "Attacked",
              "Mugged",
              "Hospitalized",
              "Arrested",
              "Looted",
              "Lost",
              "Stalemate",
              "Assist",
              "Escape",
              "Timeout",
              "Special",
              "Bounty",
              "Interrupted"
            ]
          },
          "respect_gain": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "respect_loss": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/balance
**Summary:** Get your faction's & member's balance details

**Description:** Requires limited access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | By default, this selection will return only current faction's member balances, and the option 'all' will return all current members balances + additionally those of ex-members which do have money or points on their balance. | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "balance"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "balance": {
      "required": [
        "faction",
        "members"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "faction": {
          "required": [
            "money",
            "points",
            "scope"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "money": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "points": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "scope": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "members": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "money",
              "points"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "money": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "points": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/basic
**Summary:** Get your faction's basic details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> The 'is_enlisted' value will be populated if you have API faction permissions (with custom, limited or full access keys), otherwise it will be set as null.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "basic"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "basic": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name",
        "tag",
        "tag_image",
        "banner_image",
        "leader_id",
        "co_leader_id",
        "respect",
        "days_old",
        "capacity",
        "members",
        "is_enlisted",
        "rank",
        "best_chain"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "tag": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "tag_image": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "banner_image": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "leader_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "co_leader_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "respect": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "days_old": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "capacity": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "members": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "is_enlisted": {
          "description": "Indicates if the faction is enlisted for ranked wars. Available only with faction AA permissions for your own faction.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "rank": {
          "required": [
            "level",
            "name",
            "division",
            "position",
            "wins"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "level": {
              "description": "/**",
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "division": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "position": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "wins": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "best_chain": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "note": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/chain
**Summary:** Get your faction's current chain

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "chain"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "chain": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "current",
        "max",
        "timeout",
        "modifier",
        "cooldown",
        "start",
        "end"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "current": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "max": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "timeout": {
          "description": "Seconds until chain breaks.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "modifier": {
          "type": "number",
          "format": "float"
        },
        "cooldown": {

          "format": "int32"

          "format": "int32"
        },
        "end": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```
