## [Faction] GET /faction/chains
**Summary:** Get a list of your faction's completed chains

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "chains",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "chains": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "chain",
          "respect",
          "start",
          "end"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "chain": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "respect": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "start": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "end": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{id}/chains
**Summary:** Get a list of a faction's completed chains

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Faction id | Yes | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "chains",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "chains": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "chain",
          "respect",
          "start",
          "end"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "chain": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "respect": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "start": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "end": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/chainreport
**Summary:** Get your faction's latest chain report

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> This includes currently ongoing chains.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

## [Faction] GET /faction/contributors
**Summary:** Get your faction's challenge contributors

**Description:** Requires limiteed access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| stat | query | Get contributors for this field. | Yes | string |
| cat | query | By default, this selection will return only current faction's member contributions, and the option 'all' will return all contributors. | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "contributors"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "contributors": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "username",
          "value",
          "in_faction"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "username": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "value": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "in_faction": {
            "type": "boolean"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/crimes
**Summary:** Get your faction's organized crimes

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br> It's possible to get older entries either by timestamp range (from, to) or with offset.<br> Crimes are ordered depending on the category chosen:
 * For categories 'all' & 'available', the ordering field is 'created_at'.
 * For categories 'successful', 'failed' & 'completed', the ordering field is 'executed_at'.
 * For categories 'recruiting' & 'expired', the ordering field is 'expired_at'.
 * For category 'planning', the ordering field is 'ready_at'.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Category of organized crimes returned. Category 'available' includes both 'recruiting' & 'planning', and category 'completed' includes both 'successful' & 'failure'<br>Default category is 'all'. | No | string |
| filters | query | It's possible to set this parameter to specify a field used for the sort, from & to query parameters. If not specified, the field will default to the category sorting as described above. | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "crimes",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "crimes": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "previous_crime_id",
          "difficulty",
          "status",
          "created_at",
          "planning_at",
          "ready_at",
          "expired_at",
          "executed_at",
          "slots",
          "rewards"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "previous_crime_id": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "difficulty": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Recruiting",
              "Planning",
              "Successful",
              "Failure",
              "Expired"
            ]
          },
          "created_at": {
            "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was created.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "planning_at": {
            "description": "The timestamp at which the planning phase for the crime has begun.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "ready_at": {
            "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will be ready.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "expired_at": {
            "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will expire.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "executed_at": {
            "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was executed. <br> Note: this value is null for all crimes executed before January 15th, 2025.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "slots": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "position",
                "position_info",
                "item_requirement",
                "user",
                "checkpoint_pass_rate"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "position": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "position_info": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "label",
                    "number"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "P1",
                        "P2",
                        "P3",
                        "P4",
                        "P5",
                        "P6"
                      ]
                    },
                    "label": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "number": {
                      "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "deprecated": true
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "position_id": {
                  "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "P1",
                    "P2",
                    "P3",
                    "P4",
                    "P5",
                    "P6"
                  ],
                  "deprecated": true
                },
                "position_number": {
                  "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'number' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32",
                  "deprecated": true
                },
                "item_requirement": {
                  "description": "Details of item required for the slot, if applicable.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "is_reusable",
                        "is_available"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        },
                        "is_reusable": {
                          "description": "Shows if the item is reusable or consumed during the crime.<br><b>Important note: There may be alternative paths which won't consume the item, even if the item is non-reusable.</b>",
                          "type": "boolean"
                        },
                        "is_available": {
                          "description": "Shows if user has the required item.",
                          "type": "boolean"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "user": {
                  "description": "Details about the user joined the slot, if any.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "outcome",
                        "joined_at",
                        "progress",
                        "item_outcome"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "outcome": {
                          "description": "This field will be null for old crimes.",
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "string",
                              "enum": [
                                "Successful",
                                "Failed",
                                "Jailed",
                                "Injured",
                                "Hospitalized"
                              ]
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "outcome_duration": {
                          "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the outcome is 'Jailed' or 'Hospitalized'.",
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "item_outcome": {
                          "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the item was used or lost.",
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "required": [
                                "owned_by",
                                "item_id",
                                "item_uid",
                                "outcome"
                              ],
                              "properties": {
                                "owned_by": {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "enum": [
                                    "user",
                                    "faction"
                                  ]
                                },
                                "item_id": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int64"
                                },
                                "item_uid": {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int64"
                                },
                                "outcome": {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "enum": [
                                    "lost",
                                    "used"
                                  ]
                                }
                              },
                              "type": "object"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "joined_at": {
                          "description": "The timestamp at which the user joined the slot.",
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "progress": {
                          "description": "Current planning progress on the slot.",
                          "type": "number",
                          "format": "float"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "checkpoint_pass_rate": {
                  "description": "Returns CPR for the player who joined the slot. If the slot is empty (availalbe), it shows your CPR for that slot. This value is 0 for expired crimes.",
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "rewards": {
            "description": "Details about the crime rewards. Available only for crimes with 'Successful' status.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "money",
                  "items",
                  "respect",
                  "payout",
                  "scope"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "money": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "items": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "quantity"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        },
                        "quantity": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "respect": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "scope": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "payout": {
                    "description": "Details about the crime payouts. This field is null if the crime has not been paid via the automatic payouts system.",
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "type",
                          "percentage",
                          "paid_by",
                          "paid_at"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "type": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "balance",
                              "wallet",
                              "inventory"
                            ]
                          },
                          "percentage": {
                            "description": "Total percentage split between all participants.",
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          },
                          "paid_by": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "paid_at": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{crimeId}/crime
**Summary:** Get a specific organized crime

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| crimeId | path | Crime id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "crime"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "crime": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name",
        "previous_crime_id",
        "difficulty",
        "status",
        "created_at",
        "planning_at",
        "ready_at",
        "expired_at",
        "executed_at",
        "slots",
        "rewards"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        },
        "previous_crime_id": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "difficulty": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "status": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "Recruiting",
            "Planning",
            "Successful",
            "Failure",
            "Expired"
          ]
        },
        "created_at": {
          "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was created.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "planning_at": {
          "description": "The timestamp at which the planning phase for the crime has begun.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "ready_at": {
          "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will be ready.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "expired_at": {
          "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will expire.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "executed_at": {
          "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was executed. <br> Note: this value is null for all crimes executed before January 15th, 2025.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "slots": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "position",
              "position_info",
              "item_requirement",
              "user",
              "checkpoint_pass_rate"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "position": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "position_info": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "label",
                  "number"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "P1",
                      "P2",
                      "P3",
                      "P4",
                      "P5",
                      "P6"
                    ]
                  },
                  "label": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "number": {
                    "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32",
                    "deprecated": true
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "position_id": {
                "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "P1",
                  "P2",
                  "P3",
                  "P4",
                  "P5",
                  "P6"
                ],
                "deprecated": true
              },
              "position_number": {
                "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'number' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32",
                "deprecated": true
              },
              "item_requirement": {
                "description": "Details of item required for the slot, if applicable.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "is_reusable",
                      "is_available"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "is_reusable": {
                        "description": "Shows if the item is reusable or consumed during the crime.<br><b>Important note: There may be alternative paths which won't consume the item, even if the item is non-reusable.</b>",
                        "type": "boolean"
                      },
                      "is_available": {
                        "description": "Shows if user has the required item.",
                        "type": "boolean"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "user": {
                "description": "Details about the user joined the slot, if any.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "outcome",
                      "joined_at",
                      "progress",
                      "item_outcome"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "outcome": {
                        "description": "This field will be null for old crimes.",
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "Successful",
                              "Failed",
                              "Jailed",
                              "Injured",
                              "Hospitalized"
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "outcome_duration": {
                        "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the outcome is 'Jailed' or 'Hospitalized'.",
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "item_outcome": {
                        "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the item was used or lost.",
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "owned_by",
                              "item_id",
                              "item_uid",
                              "outcome"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "owned_by": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "user",
                                  "faction"
                                ]
                              },
                              "item_id": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int64"
                              },
                              "item_uid": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int64"
                              },
                              "outcome": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "lost",
                                  "used"
                                ]
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      "joined_at": {
                        "description": "The timestamp at which the user joined the slot.",
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "progress": {
                        "description": "Current planning progress on the slot.",
                        "type": "number",
                        "format": "float"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "checkpoint_pass_rate": {
                "description": "Returns CPR for the player who joined the slot. If the slot is empty (availalbe), it shows your CPR for that slot. This value is 0 for expired crimes.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "rewards": {
          "description": "Details about the crime rewards. Available only for crimes with 'Successful' status.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "money",
                "items",
                "respect",
                "payout",
                "scope"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "money": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "items": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "quantity"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "quantity": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                },
                "respect": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "scope": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "payout": {
                  "description": "Details about the crime payouts. This field is null if the crime has not been paid via the automatic payouts system.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "required": [
                        "type",
                        "percentage",
                        "paid_by",
                        "paid_at"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "type": {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "balance",
                            "wallet",
                            "inventory"
                          ]
                        },
                        "percentage": {
                          "description": "Total percentage split between all participants.",
                          "type": "number",
                          "format": "float"
                        },
                        "paid_by": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "paid_at": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }

                      "type": "null"

                  ]

              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "type": "object"

  "type": "object"
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/hof
**Summary:** Get your faction's hall of fame rankings.

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "hof"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "hof": {
      "required": [
        "rank",
        "respect",
        "chain"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "rank": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "rank"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "rank": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "respect": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "rank"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "rank": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "chain": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "rank"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "rank": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{id}/hof
**Summary:** Get a faction's hall of fame rankings.

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Faction id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "hof"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "hof": {
      "required": [
        "rank",
        "respect",
        "chain"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "rank": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "rank"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "rank": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "respect": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "rank"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "rank": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "chain": {
          "required": [
            "value",
            "rank"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "value": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "rank": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/members
**Summary:** Get a list of your faction's members

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> The 'revive_setting' value will be populated (not Unknown) if you have faction permissions (with custom, limited or full access keys), otherwise it will be set as 'Unknown'.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "members"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "members": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "description": "Details about a faction member.",
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "position",
          "level",
          "days_in_faction",
          "is_revivable",
          "is_on_wall",
          "is_in_oc",
          "has_early_discharge",
          "last_action",
          "status",
          "revive_setting"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "position": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "days_in_faction": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_revivable": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_on_wall": {
            "description": "Shows if the member is currently defending territory wall.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_in_oc": {
            "description": "Shows if the member is currently participating in an organized crime. Show false for members of other factions.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "has_early_discharge": {
            "description": "Shows if the member is eligible for an early discharge from the hospital.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "last_action": {
            "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
            "required": [
              "status",
              "timestamp",
              "relative"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Online",
                  "Idle",
                  "Offline"
                ]
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "relative": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "status": {
            "description": "Details about a user's status.",
            "required": [
              "description",
              "details",
              "state",
              "until",
              "color"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "details": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "state": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Abroad",
                      "Awoken",
                      "Dormant",
                      "Fallen",
                      "Federal",
                      "Hospital",
                      "Jail",
                      "Okay",
                      "Traveling"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "color": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "until": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "plane_image_type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "private_jet",
                  "light_aircraft",
                  "airliner"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "revive_setting": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Everyone",
              "Friends & faction",
              "No one",
              "Unknown"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{id}/members
**Summary:** Get a list of a faction's members

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> The 'revive_setting' value will be populated (not Unknown) if you're requesting data for your own faction and have faction permissions (with custom, limited or full access keys), otherwise it will be set as 'Unknown'.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Faction id | Yes | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "members"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "members": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "description": "Details about a faction member.",
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "position",
          "level",
          "days_in_faction",
          "is_revivable",
          "is_on_wall",
          "is_in_oc",
          "has_early_discharge",
          "last_action",
          "status",
          "revive_setting"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "position": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "days_in_faction": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_revivable": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_on_wall": {
            "description": "Shows if the member is currently defending territory wall.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_in_oc": {
            "description": "Shows if the member is currently participating in an organized crime. Show false for members of other factions.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "has_early_discharge": {
            "description": "Shows if the member is eligible for an early discharge from the hospital.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "last_action": {
            "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
            "required": [
              "status",
              "timestamp",
              "relative"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Online",
                  "Idle",
                  "Offline"
                ]
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "relative": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "status": {
            "description": "Details about a user's status.",
            "required": [
              "description",
              "details",
              "state",
              "until",
              "color"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "details": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "state": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Abroad",
                      "Awoken",
                      "Dormant",
                      "Fallen",
                      "Federal",
                      "Hospital",
                      "Jail",
                      "Okay",
                      "Traveling"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "color": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "until": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "plane_image_type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "private_jet",
                  "light_aircraft",
                  "airliner"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "revive_setting": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Everyone",
              "Friends & faction",
              "No one",
              "Unknown"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/news
**Summary:** Get your faction's news details

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br> It is possible to pass up to 10 categories at the time (comma separated). Categories 'attack', 'depositFunds' and 'giveFunds' are only available with 'Custom', 'Limited' or 'Full' access keys.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| cat | query | News category type | Yes | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "news",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "news": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "text",
          "timestamp"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "text": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/positions
**Summary:** Get your faction's positions details

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
{

    "positions"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "positions": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "name",
          "is_default",
          "abilities"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "is_default": {
            "type": "boolean"

            "type": "array",

                "Application Management",
                "Kick Members",
                "Balance Adjustment",
                "War Management",
                "Upgrade Management",
                "Newsletter Sending",
                "Announcement Changes",
                "Description Changes",
                "Utility Loaning",
                "Consumable Usage",
                "Medical Loaning",
                "Consumable Loaning",
                "Drug Loaning",
                "Booster Loaning"
              ]
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/rackets
**Summary:** Get a list of current rackets

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "rackets"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "rackets": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "name",
          "level",
          "description",
          "reward",
          "created_at",
          "changed_at"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "reward": {
            "required": [
              "type",
              "quantity",
              "id"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Item",
                  "Points",
                  "Money"
                ]
              },
              "quantity": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "created_at": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "changed_at": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/{raidWarId}/raidreport
**Summary:** Get raid war details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| raidWarId | path | Raid war id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "raidreport"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "raidreport": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "start",
          "end",
          "aggressor",
          "defender"
        ],
        "properties": {

            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },

            "format": "int32"

              "attackers",
              "non_attackers"

              },

                "type": "string"
              },

                "format": "float"
              },

                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "user",
                    "attacks",
                    "damage"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "user": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "name"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",

                        },
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "attacks": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "damage": {
                      "type": "number",
                      "format": "float"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "non_attackers": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "defender": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "score",
              "attackers",
              "non_attackers"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "score": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "attackers": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "user",
                    "attacks",
                    "damage"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "user": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "name"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "attacks": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "damage": {
                      "type": "number",
                      "format": "float"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "non_attackers": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/raids
**Summary:** Get raids history for your faction

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "raids",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "raids": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "start",
          "end",
          "aggressor",
          "defender"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "start": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "end": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "aggressor": {
            "description": "The field 'chain' exists only if the field 'end' is NOT populated in FactionRaidWarfare schema.",
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "score"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "score": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "chain": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "defender": {
            "description": "The field 'chain' exists only if the field 'end' is NOT populated in FactionRaidWarfare schema.",
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "score"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "score": {
                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "chain": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/rankedwars
**Summary:** Get ranked wars history for your faction

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Use offset to get older results which are always ordered descending.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "rankedwars",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "rankedwars": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "start",
          "end",
          "target",
          "winner",
          "factions"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "start": {
            "description": "Timestamp the war started at.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "end": {
            "description": "Timestamp the war ended at.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "target": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "winner": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "factions": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name",
                "score",
                "chain"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "score": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "chain": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{id}/rankedwars
**Summary:** Get a faction's ranked wars history

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Use offset to get older results which are always ordered descending.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Faction id | Yes | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "rankedwars",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "rankedwars": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "start",
          "end",
          "target",
          "winner",
          "factions"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "start": {
            "description": "Timestamp the war started at.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "end": {
            "description": "Timestamp the war ended at.",
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "target": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "winner": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "factions": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name",
                "score",
                "chain"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "score": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "chain": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```
