## [Faction] GET /faction/{rankedWarId}/rankedwarreport
**Summary:** Get ranked war details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| rankedWarId | path | Ranked war id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "rankedwarreport"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "rankedwarreport": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "start",
        "end",
        "winner",
        "forfeit",
        "factions"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "start": {
          "description": "Timestamp the war started at.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "end": {
          "description": "Timestamp the war ended at.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "winner": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "forfeit": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "factions": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "score",
              "attacks",
              "rank",
              "rewards",
              "members"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "score": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "attacks": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "rank": {
                "required": [
                  "before",
                  "after"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "before": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "after": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "rewards": {
                "required": [
                  "respect",
                  "points",
                  "items"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "respect": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "points": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "items": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "name",
                        "quantity"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        },
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "quantity": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "members": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name",
                    "level",
                    "attacks",
                    "score"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "level": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "attacks": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "score": {
                      "type": "number",
                      "format": "float"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/reports
**Summary:** Get faction reports

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>
The limit is set to 25 when requesting any category other than 'stats'.<br>
When requesting the 'stats' category, limit can be increased up to 100.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Used to filter reports with a specific type. | No | string |
| target | query | Get reports for a specific player by passing their player ID. | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{

    "reports",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "reports": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "allOf": [
          {
            "required": [
              "type",
              "target_id",
              "reporter_id",
              "faction_id",
              "timestamp"

                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "mostwanted",
                  "money",
                  "stats",

                  "investment"

                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },

                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]

              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },

              "report"

            "properties": {

                "oneOf": [
                  {

                        "type": "integer",
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/revives
**Summary:** Get your faction's detailed revives

**Description:** Requires limited access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "revives",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "revives": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "reviver",
          "target",
          "success_chance",
          "result",
          "timestamp"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "reviver": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "faction",
              "skill"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "faction": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "skill": {
                "description": "Entries before 16/06/2025 will have this field set as null.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "number",
                    "format": "float"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "target": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "faction",
              "hospital_reason",
              "early_discharge",
              "last_action",
              "online_status"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "faction": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "hospital_reason": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "early_discharge": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "last_action": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "online_status": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "success_chance": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "result": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/revivesFull
**Summary:** Get your faction's simplified revives

**Description:** Requires limited access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| filters | query | It's possible to use this query parameter to only get incoming or outgoing attacks / revives. If not specified, this selection will return both incoming and outgoing attacks / revives.
It's also possible to combine this with 'idFilter'. This filter allows using from/to to filter by ids instead of timestamps. | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "revives",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "revives": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "reviver",
          "target",
          "success_chance",
          "result",
          "timestamp"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "reviver": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "faction_id"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "faction_id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "target": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "faction_id",
              "hospital_reason",
              "early_discharge",
              "last_action",
              "online_status"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "faction_id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "hospital_reason": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "early_discharge": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "last_action": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "online_status": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "success_chance": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "result": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/search
**Summary:** Search factions by name or other criteria

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>This selection is standalone and cannot be used together with other selections.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| name | query | Name  to search for. | No | string |
| filters | query | A filtering query parameter allowing a comma-separated list of filters. <br>
 * Each filter can be one of the following:
 * Fixed options: 'destroyed', 'notDestroyed', 'recruiting', 'notRecruiting'
 * Dynamic options: `fieldName`+`condition`+`number`, where:
 * * `fieldName` is one of: `id`, `respect`, `members`
 * * `condition` is one of: `Equal`, `NotEqual`, `Less`, `LessOrEqual`, `GreaterOrEqual`, `Greater`
 * * `number`: any integer value
 * Examples: `filters=destroyed`, `filters=notDestroyed,recruiting`, `filters=respectLessOrEqual20000,idGreater100,notRecruiting` | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "search",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "search": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "respect",
          "members",
          "leader",
          "co_leader",
          "image",
          "tag_image",
          "tag",
          "is_destroyed",
          "is_recruiting"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "respect": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "members": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "leader": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "co_leader": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "image": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "tag_image": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "tag": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "is_destroyed": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_recruiting": {
            "type": "boolean"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/stats
**Summary:** Get your faction's challenges stats

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "stats"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "stats": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "name",
          "value"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "name": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "medicalitemsused",
              "criminaloffences",
              "organisedcrimerespect",
              "organisedcrimemoney",
              "organisedcrimesuccess",
              "organisedcrimefail",
              "attackswon",
              "attackslost",
              "attackschain",
              "attacksleave",
              "attacksmug",
              "attackshosp",
              "bestchain",
              "busts",
              "revives",
              "jails",
              "hosps",
              "medicalitemrecovery",
              "medicalcooldownused",
              "gymtrains",
              "gymstrength",
              "gymspeed",
              "gymenergy",
              "gymdefense",
              "gymdexterity",
              "candyused",
              "alcoholused",
              "energydrinkused",
              "drugsused",
              "drugoverdoses",
              "rehabs",
              "caymaninterest",
              "traveltimes",
              "traveltime",
              "hunting",
              "attacksdamagehits",
              "attacksdamage",
              "hosptimegiven",
              "hosptimereceived",
              "attacksdamaging",
              "attacksrunaway",
              "highestterritories",
              "territoryrespect"
            ]
          },
          "value": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---


---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{id}/territory
**Summary:** Get a list of a faction's territories

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Faction id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/territoryownership
**Summary:** Get a list territory ownership

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "territoryOwnership"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "territoryOwnership": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "owned_by",
          "acquired_at"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "owned_by": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "acquired_at": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/territorywars
**Summary:** Get territory wars history for your faction

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "territorywars"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "territorywars": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "territory",
          "start",
          "end",
          "target",
          "result",
          "factions"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "territory": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "AAB",
              "AAC",
              "AAD",

```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{id}/territorywars
**Summary:** Get a faction's territory wars history

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Faction id | Yes | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/{territoryWarId}/territorywarreport
**Summary:** Get territory war details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| territoryWarId | path | Territory war id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation


---

## [Faction] GET /faction/upgrades
**Summary:** Get your faction's upgrades

**Description:** Requires minimal access key with faction API access permissions. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Minimal).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "upgrades",
    "state"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "upgrades": {
      "required": [
        "core",
        "peace",
        "war"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "core": {
          "properties": {
            "upgrades": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "ability",
                  "level",
                  "cost",
                  "unlockedAt"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "ability": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "level": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "cost": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "unlocked_at": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "peace": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "name",
              "order",
              "multiplier",
              "upgrades"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "order": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "multiplier": {
                "description": "Respect cost multiplier.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "upgrades": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name",
                    "ability",
                    "level",
                    "cost",
                    "unlockedAt"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "ability": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "level": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "cost": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "unlocked_at": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "war": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "name",
              "order",
              "multiplier",
              "upgrades"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "order": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "multiplier": {
                "description": "Respect cost multiplier.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "upgrades": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name",
                    "ability",
                    "level",
                    "cost",
                    "unlockedAt"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "ability": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "level": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "cost": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "unlocked_at": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "state": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "war",
        "peace"
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction/warfare
**Summary:** Get faction warfare

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>The response depends on the selected category.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query |  | Yes | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
                "type": "object"
              },
              "user": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/wars
**Summary:** Get your faction's wars & pacts details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "pacts",
    "wars"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "pacts": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "faction_id",
          "faction_name",

            "format": "int32"

            "type": "string"

            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"

    },

                "end",

                "factions"
              ],
              "properties": {

                  "type": "integer",

                  "format": "int32"

                "end": {

                    {
                      "type": "integer",

                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }

                  "format": "int32"
                },

                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "factions": {
                  "description": "The factions involved in the ranked war.",
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "score",
                      "chain"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "score": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "chain": {
                        "description": "Faction's current chain.",
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ]
        },
        "raids": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "war_id",
              "start",
              "end",
              "factions"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "war_id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "start": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "end": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "factions": {
                "description": "The factions involved in the raid war.",

                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name",
                    "score",
                    "chain",
                    "is_aggressor"

                  "properties": {

                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "score": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "chain": {
                      "description": "Faction's current chain.",
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "is_aggressor": {
                      "type": "boolean"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },

                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }

              },
              "target": {
                "description": "The score target of the war.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "winner": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {

                  }

                    "score",
                    "chain",
                    "is_aggressor",
                    "playerIds"

                  "properties": {

                      "type": "integer",
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/lookup
**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'armor', 'boosters', 'caches', 'cesium', 'crimeexp', 'drugs', 'medical', 'utilities', 'temporary', 'weapons'.\n *  The following selections are not available in API v2: 'armorynews', 'attacknews', 'crimenews', 'currency', 'donations', 'fundsnews', 'mainnews', 'membershipnews', 'territorynews'.",
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "applications",
              "attacks",
              "attacksfull",
              "balance",
              "basic",
              "chain",
              "chainreport",
              "chains",
              "contributors",
              "crime",
              "crimes",
              "hof",
              "lookup",
              "members",
              "news",
              "positions",
              "rackets",
              "raidreport",
              "raids",
              "rankedwars",
              "rankedwarreport",
              "reports",
              "revives",
              "revivesfull",
              "search",
              "stats",
              "territory",
              "territoryownership",
              "territorywarreport",
              "territorywars",
              "timestamp",
              "upgrades",
              "warfare",
              "wars",
              "armor",
              "boosters",
              "caches",
              "cesium",
              "crimeexp",
              "drugs",
              "medical",
              "utilities",
              "temporary",
              "weapons"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Faction] GET /faction/timestamp
**Summary:** Get current server time

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "timestamp"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Faction] GET /faction
**Summary:** Get any Faction selection

**Description:** Key access level depends on the required selections. <br> Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}]} |
| legacy | query | Legacy selection names for which you want or expect API v1 response | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| cat | query | Selection category | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["all","current"]},{"type":"string","enum":["all","recruiting","planning","failure","successful","expired","available","completed"]},{"type":"string","enum":["main","attack","armoryDeposit","armoryAction","territoryWar","rankedWar","territoryGain","chain","crime","membership","depositFunds","giveFunds"]},{"type":"string","enum":["all","ongoing"]},{"type":"string","enum":["mostwanted","money","stats","references","friendorfoe","companyfinancials","truelevel","stockanalysis","anonymousbounties","investment"]},{"type":"string","enum":["ranked","territory","raid","chain","chainOngoing","db"]},{"type":"string","enum":["finsihed","ongoing"]}]} |
| stat | query | Stat category | No | string |
| filters | query |  | No | string |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "anyOf": [
    {
      "required": [
        "hof"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hof": {
          "required": [
            "rank",
            "respect",
            "chain"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "rank": {
              "required": [
                "value",
                "rank"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "value": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "rank": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "respect": {
              "required": [
                "value",
                "rank"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "value": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "rank": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "chain": {
              "required": [
                "value",
                "rank"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "value": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "rank": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "members"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "members": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "description": "Details about a faction member.",
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "position",
              "level",
              "days_in_faction",
              "is_revivable",
              "is_on_wall",
              "is_in_oc",
              "has_early_discharge",
              "last_action",
              "status",
              "revive_setting"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "position": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "days_in_faction": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "is_revivable": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_on_wall": {
                "description": "Shows if the member is currently defending territory wall.",
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_in_oc": {
                "description": "Shows if the member is currently participating in an organized crime. Show false for members of other factions.",
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "has_early_discharge": {
                "description": "Shows if the member is eligible for an early discharge from the hospital.",
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "last_action": {
                "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
                "required": [
                  "status",
                  "timestamp",
                  "relative"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "status": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Online",
                      "Idle",
                      "Offline"
                    ]
                  },
                  "timestamp": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "relative": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "status": {
                "description": "Details about a user's status.",
                "required": [
                  "description",
                  "details",
                  "state",
                  "until",
                  "color"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "description": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "details": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "state": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "Abroad",
                          "Awoken",
                          "Dormant",
                          "Fallen",
                          "Federal",
                          "Hospital",
                          "Jail",
                          "Okay",
                          "Traveling"
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "color": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "until": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "plane_image_type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "private_jet",
                      "light_aircraft",
                      "airliner"
                    ]
                  }

                  "id",

                    "type": "integer",

                  },

                        "required": [

                          "speed",
                          "dexterity",
                          "defense"

                        "properties": {
                          "strength": {
                            "type": "integer",

                          "speed": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          "dexterity": {

                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }

                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {

                  }

              },

                "type": "integer",

    {
      "required": [
        "crimes",
        "_metadata"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "crimes": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "previous_crime_id",
              "difficulty",
              "status",
              "created_at",
              "planning_at",
              "ready_at",
              "expired_at",
              "executed_at",
              "slots",
              "rewards"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "previous_crime_id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "difficulty": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Recruiting",
                  "Planning",
                  "Successful",
                  "Failure",
                  "Expired"
                ]
              },
              "created_at": {
                "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was created.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "planning_at": {
                "description": "The timestamp at which the planning phase for the crime has begun.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "ready_at": {
                "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will be ready.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "expired_at": {
                "description": "The timestamp at which the crime will expire.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "executed_at": {
                "description": "The timestamp at which the crime was executed. <br> Note: this value is null for all crimes executed before January 15th, 2025.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "slots": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "position",
                    "position_info",
                    "item_requirement",
                    "user",
                    "checkpoint_pass_rate"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "position": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "position_info": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "label",
                        "number"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "P1",
                            "P2",
                            "P3",
                            "P4",
                            "P5",
                            "P6"
                          ]
                        },
                        "label": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "number": {
                          "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32",
                          "deprecated": true
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "position_id": {
                      "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "P1",
                        "P2",
                        "P3",
                        "P4",
                        "P5",
                        "P6"
                      ],
                      "deprecated": true
                    },
                    "position_number": {
                      "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'number' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "deprecated": true
                    },
                    "item_requirement": {
                      "description": "Details of item required for the slot, if applicable.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "is_reusable",
                            "is_available"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int64"
                            },
                            "is_reusable": {
                              "description": "Shows if the item is reusable or consumed during the crime.<br><b>Important note: There may be alternative paths which won't consume the item, even if the item is non-reusable.</b>",
                              "type": "boolean"
                            },
                            "is_available": {
                              "description": "Shows if user has the required item.",
                              "type": "boolean"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    "user": {
                      "description": "Details about the user joined the slot, if any.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "outcome",
                            "joined_at",
                            "progress",
                            "item_outcome"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "outcome": {
                              "description": "This field will be null for old crimes.",
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "enum": [
                                    "Successful",
                                    "Failed",
                                    "Jailed",
                                    "Injured",
                                    "Hospitalized"
                                  ]
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            },
                            "outcome_duration": {
                              "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the outcome is 'Jailed' or 'Hospitalized'.",
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int32"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            },
                            "item_outcome": {
                              "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the item was used or lost.",
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "required": [
                                    "owned_by",
                                    "item_id",
                                    "item_uid",
                                    "outcome"
                                  ],
                                  "properties": {
                                    "owned_by": {
                                      "type": "string",
                                      "enum": [
                                        "user",
                                        "faction"
                                      ]
                                    },
                                    "item_id": {
                                      "type": "integer",
                                      "format": "int64"
                                    },
                                    "item_uid": {
                                      "type": "integer",
                                      "format": "int64"
                                    },
                                    "outcome": {
                                      "type": "string",
                                      "enum": [
                                        "lost",
                                        "used"
                                      ]
                                    }
                                  },
                                  "type": "object"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            },
                            "joined_at": {
                              "description": "The timestamp at which the user joined the slot.",
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "progress": {
                              "description": "Current planning progress on the slot.",
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    "checkpoint_pass_rate": {
                      "description": "Returns CPR for the player who joined the slot. If the slot is empty (availalbe), it shows your CPR for that slot. This value is 0 for expired crimes.",
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "rewards": {
                "description": "Details about the crime rewards. Available only for crimes with 'Successful' status.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "money",
                      "items",
                      "respect",
                      "payout",
                      "scope"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "money": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "items": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "quantity"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int64"
                            },
                            "quantity": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "respect": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "scope": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "payout": {
                        "description": "Details about the crime payouts. This field is null if the crime has not been paid via the automatic payouts system.",
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "type",
                              "percentage",
                              "paid_by",
                              "paid_at"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "type": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "balance",
                                  "wallet",
                                  "inventory"
                                ]
                              },
                              "percentage": {
                                "description": "Total percentage split between all participants.",
                                "type": "number",
                                "format": "float"
                              },
                              "paid_by": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "paid_at": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "_metadata": {
          "required": [
            "links"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "links": {
              "required": [
                "next",
                "prev"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "next": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "prev": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
```
