```json
                  "checkpoint_pass_rate"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "position": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "position_info": {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "label",
                      "number"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "P1",
                          "P2",
                          "P3",
                          "P4",
                          "P5",
                          "P6"
                        ]
                      },
                      "label": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "number": {
                        "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32",
                        "deprecated": true
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "position_id": {
                    "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "P1",
                      "P2",
                      "P3",
                      "P4",
                      "P5",
                      "P6"
                    ],
                    "deprecated": true
                  },
                  "position_number": {
                    "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'number' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32",
                    "deprecated": true
                  },
                  "item_requirement": {
                    "description": "Details of item required for the slot, if applicable.",
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "is_reusable",
                          "is_available"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          "is_reusable": {
                            "description": "Shows if the item is reusable or consumed during the crime.<br><b>Important note: There may be alternative paths which won't consume the item, even if the item is non-reusable.</b>",
                            "type": "boolean"
                          },
                          "is_available": {
                            "description": "Shows if user has the required item.",
                            "type": "boolean"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "user": {
                    "description": "Details about the user joined the slot, if any.",
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "outcome",
                          "joined_at",
                          "progress",
                          "item_outcome"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "outcome": {
                            "description": "This field will be null for old crimes.",
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "Successful",
                                  "Failed",
                                  "Jailed",
                                  "Injured",
                                  "Hospitalized"
                                ]
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "outcome_duration": {
                            "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the outcome is 'Jailed' or 'Hospitalized'.",
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "item_outcome": {
                            "description": "This field is only populated for crimes completed after 25/07/2025 and only if the item was used or lost.",
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "required": [
                                  "owned_by",
                                  "item_id",
                                  "item_uid",
                                  "outcome"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                  "owned_by": {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "enum": [
                                      "user",
                                      "faction"
                                    ]
                                  },
                                  "item_id": {
                                    "type": "integer",
                                    "format": "int64"
                                  },
                                  "item_uid": {
                                    "type": "integer",
                                    "format": "int64"
                                  },
                                  "outcome": {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "enum": [
                                      "lost",
                                      "used"
                                    ]
                                  }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "joined_at": {
                            "description": "The timestamp at which the user joined the slot.",
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "progress": {
                            "description": "Current planning progress on the slot.",
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "checkpoint_pass_rate": {
                    "description": "Returns CPR for the player who joined the slot. If the slot is empty (availalbe), it shows your CPR for that slot. This value is 0 for expired crimes.",
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "rewards": {
              "description": "Details about the crime rewards. Available only for crimes with 'Successful' status.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "money",
                    "items",
                    "respect",
                    "payout",
                    "scope"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "money": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "items": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "quantity"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int64"
                          },
                          "quantity": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    },
                    "respect": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "scope": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "payout": {
                      "description": "Details about the crime payouts. This field is null if the crime has not been paid via the automatic payouts system.",
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "required": [
                            "type",
                            "percentage",
                            "paid_by",
                            "paid_at"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "type": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "enum": [
                                "balance",
                                "wallet",
                                "inventory"
                              ]
                            },
                            "percentage": {
                              "description": "Total percentage split between all participants.",
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            "paid_by": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "paid_at": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "raids",
        "_metadata"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "raids": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "start",
              "end",
              "aggressor",
              "defender"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "start": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "end": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "aggressor": {
                "description": "The field 'chain' exists only if the field 'end' is NOT populated in FactionRaidWarfare schema.",
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "score"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "score": {
                    "type": "number",
                    "format": "float"
                  },
                  "chain": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "defender": {
                "description": "The field 'chain' exists only if the field 'end' is NOT populated in FactionRaidWarfare schema.",
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "score"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "score": {
                    "type": "number",
                    "format": "float"
                  },
                  "chain": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "_metadata": {
          "required": [
            "links"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "links": {
              "required": [
                "next",
                "prev"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "next": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "prev": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },

              "type": "array",

                  },

                        "type": "integer",

                  "medicalitemrecovery",
                  "medicalcooldownused",
                  "gymtrains",
                  "gymstrength",
                  "gymspeed",
                  "gymenergy",
                  "gymdefense",
                  "gymdexterity",
                  "candyused",
                  "alcoholused",
                  "energydrinkused",
                  "drugsused",
                  "drugoverdoses",
                  "rehabs",
                  "caymaninterest",
                  "traveltimes",
                  "traveltime",
                  "hunting",
                  "attacksdamagehits",
                  "attacksdamage",
                  "hosptimegiven",
                  "hosptimereceived",
                  "attacksdamaging",
                  "attacksrunaway",
                  "highestterritories",
                  "territoryrespect"
                ]
              },
              "value": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "contributors"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "contributors": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "value",
              "in_faction"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "value": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "in_faction": {
                "type": "boolean"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "rackets"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "rackets": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "name",
              "level",
              "description",
              "reward",
              "created_at",
              "changed_at"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "reward": {
                "required": [
                  "type",
                  "quantity",
                  "id"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Item",
                      "Points",
                      "Money"
                    ]
                  },
                  "quantity": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "id": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "created_at": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "changed_at": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "rankedwars",
        "_metadata"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "rankedwars": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "start",
              "end",
              "target",
              "winner",
              "factions"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "start": {
                "description": "Timestamp the war started at.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "end": {
                "description": "Timestamp the war ended at.",
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "target": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "winner": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "factions": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name",
                    "score",
                    "chain"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "score": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "chain": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "_metadata": {
          "required": [
            "links"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "links": {
              "required": [
                "next",
                "prev"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "next": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "prev": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "selections"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "selections": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'armor', 'boosters', 'caches', 'cesium', 'crimeexp', 'drugs', 'medical', 'utilities', 'temporary', 'weapons'.\n *  The following selections are not available in API v2: 'armorynews', 'attacknews', 'crimenews', 'currency', 'donations', 'fundsnews', 'mainnews', 'membershipnews', 'territorynews'.",
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "applications",
                  "attacks",
                  "attacksfull",
                  "balance",
                  "basic",
                  "chain",
                  "chainreport",
                  "chains",
                  "contributors",
                  "crime",
                  "crimes",
                  "hof",
                  "lookup",
                  "members",
                  "news",
                  "positions",
                  "rackets",
                  "raidreport",
                  "raids",
                  "rankedwars",
                  "rankedwarreport",
                  "reports",
                  "revives",
                  "revivesfull",
                  "search",
                  "stats",
                  "territory",
                  "territoryownership",
                  "territorywarreport",
                  "territorywars",
                  "timestamp",
                  "upgrades",
                  "warfare",
                  "wars",
                  "armor",
                  "boosters",
                  "caches",
                  "cesium",
                  "crimeexp",
                  "drugs",
                  "medical",
                  "utilities",
                  "temporary",
                  "weapons"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "string"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "timestamp"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  ]
}
```

## [Company] GET /company/applications
**Summary:** Get your company's applications

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "applications"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "applications": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "player",
          "expires_at",
          "status",
          "message"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "player": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "level",
              "stats"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "stats": {
                "required": [
                  "manual_labor",
                  "intelligence",
                  "endurance"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "manual_labor": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "intelligence": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "endurance": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "message": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "expires_at": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "accepted",
              "declined",
              "withdrawn",
              "active"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Company] GET /company/employees
**Summary:** Get my company's employees

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>When using Limited, Custom or Full access API keys, the response will be:<br>
 * for director: CompanyEmployeeFull
 * for employee: CompanyEmployeeExtended
 * anyone else: CompanyEmployee.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json

  "required": [
    "employees"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "employees": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "position",
              "days_in_company",
              "status",
              "last_action"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "position": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"

                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "status": {
                "description": "Details about a user's status.",
                "required": [
                  "description",
                  "details",
                  "state",
                  "until",
                  "color"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "description": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "details": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "state": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "Abroad",
                          "Awoken",
                          "Dormant",
                          "Fallen",
                          "Federal",
                          "Hospital",
                          "Jail",
                          "Okay",
                          "Traveling"
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "color": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "until": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "plane_image_type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "private_jet",
                      "light_aircraft",
                      "airliner"

                },
                "type": "object"
              },

                "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
                "required": [
                  "status",
                  "timestamp",
                  "relative"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "status": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [

                  },

                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },

                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          {
```

## [Company] GET /company/{id}/employees
**Summary:** Get a company's employees

**Description:** Requires public access key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Company id | Yes | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "employees"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "employees": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "position",
          "days_in_company",
          "status",
          "last_action"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "position": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "days_in_company": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "status": {
            "description": "Details about a user's status.",
            "required": [
              "description",
              "details",
              "state",
              "until",
              "color"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "details": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "state": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Abroad",
                      "Awoken",
                      "Dormant",
                      "Fallen",
                      "Federal",
                      "Hospital",
                      "Jail",
                      "Okay",
                      "Traveling"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "color": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "until": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "plane_image_type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "private_jet",
                  "light_aircraft",
                  "airliner"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "last_action": {
            "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
            "required": [
              "status",
              "timestamp",
              "relative"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Online",
                  "Idle",
                  "Offline"
                ]
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "relative": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Company] GET /company/profile

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>When using Limited, Custom or Full access API keys, the response will be of type CompanyProfileExtended, otherwise it will be CompanyProfile.

## [Company] GET /company/{id}/profile
**Summary:** Get a company's profile

**Description:** Requires public access key.

## [Company] GET /company/stock
**Summary:** Get your company's stock

**Description:** Requires limited access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Limited).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "stock"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "stock": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "name",
          "id",
          "cost",
          "rrp",
          "price",
          "in_stock",
          "on_order",
          "sold_amount",
          "sold_worth"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "name": {
            "type": "string"

            "format": "int32"

            "format": "int64"
          },
          "rrp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "price": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "in_stock": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "on_order": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "sold_amount": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "sold_worth": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Company] GET /company/lookup
**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'companies', 'news', 'search'.\n *  The following selections are not available in API v2: 'details'.",
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "applications",
              "employees",
              "lookup",
              "profile",
              "stock",
              "timestamp",
              "companies",
              "news",
              "search"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |

| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |

## [Company] GET /company
**Summary:** Get any Company selection

**Description:** Key access level depends on the required selections. <br> Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}]} |
| legacy | query | Legacy selection names for which you want or expect API v1 response | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

```json
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "created_at": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "days_old": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "image": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "type": {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "name"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },

                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },

                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "name",
                        "status",
                        "last_action"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "status": {
                          "description": "Details about a user's status.",
                          "required": [
                            "description",
                            "details",
                            "state",
                            "until",
                            "color"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "description": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "details": {
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "string"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            },
                            "state": {
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "string",
                                  "enum": [
                                    "Abroad",
                                    "Awoken",
                                    "Dormant",
                                    "Fallen",
                                    "Federal",
                                    "Hospital",
                                    "Jail",
                                    "Okay",
                                    "Traveling"
                                  ]
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "string"
                                }
                              ]
                            },
                            "color": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "until": {
                              "oneOf": [
                                {
                                  "type": "integer",
                                  "format": "int32"
                                },
                                {
                                  "type": "null"
                                }
                              ]
                            },
                            "plane_image_type": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "enum": [
                                "private_jet",
                                "light_aircraft",
                                "airliner"
                              ]
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        },
                        "last_action": {
                          "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
                          "required": [
                            "status",
                            "timestamp",
                            "relative"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "status": {
                              "type": "string",
                              "enum": [
                                "Online",
                                "Idle",
                                "Offline"
                              ]
                            },
                            "timestamp": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "relative": {
                              "type": "string"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "employees": {
                      "required": [
                        "hired",
                        "capacity"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "hired": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "capacity": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "income": {
                      "required": [
                        "daily",
                        "weekly"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "daily": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        },
                        "weekly": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "customers": {
                      "required": [
                        "daily",
                        "weekly"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "daily": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        },
                        "weekly": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int32"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "required": [
                    "funds",
                    "popularity",
                    "efficiency",
                    "environment",
                    "trains",
                    "applications_allowed",
                    "advertisement_budget",
                    "upgrades",
                    "value"

                      "type": "integer",

                      "format": "int32"

                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int64"
                    },
                    "upgrades": {
                      "required": [
                        "staff_room",
                        "storage",
                        "storage_capacity"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "staff_room": {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "No staff room",
                            "Small staff room",
                            "Standard staff room",
                            "Large staff room",
                            "Very large staff room",
                            "Huge staff room",
                            "Colossal staff room"

                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "storage_capacity": {

                            "Large room",
                            "Huge room",
                            "Warehouse",
                            "Large warehouse",
                            "Huge warehouse"
                          ]
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "value": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int64"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
```

## [Forum] GET /forum/categories
**Summary:** Get publicly available forum categories

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "categories"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "categories": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "title",
          "acronym",
          "threads"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "acronym": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "threads": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Forum] GET /forum/{threadId}/posts
**Summary:** Get specific forum thread posts

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns 20 posts per page for a specific thread. <br> By default, it uses 'offset', but it's possible to filter posts with 'from' & 'to' parameters.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| threadId | path | Thread id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "posts",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "posts": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "thread_id",
          "author",
          "is_legacy",
          "is_topic",
          "is_edited",
          "is_pinned",
          "created_time",
          "edited_by",
          "has_quote",
          "quoted_post_id",
          "content",
          "likes",
          "dislikes"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "thread_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "author": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "is_legacy": {
            "description": "Indicates whether post was made using the old formatting engine which doesn't use HTML.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_topic": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_edited": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_pinned": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "created_time": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "edited_by": {
            "description": "'edited_by' is null when 'is_edited' is false.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "has_quote": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "quoted_post_id": {
            "description": "'quoted_post_id' is null when 'has_quote' is false.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "content": {
            "description": "depending on the input 'cat' parameter, this will either return raw value (with HTML) or plain text. Legacy posts are returned as is, they can't be stripped of tags.",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "likes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "dislikes": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Forum] GET /forum/{threadId}/thread
**Summary:** Get specific thread details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Contains details of a thread including topic content and poll (if any).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| threadId | path | Thread id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "thread"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "thread": {
      "allOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "title",
            "forum_id",
            "posts",
            "rating",
            "views",
            "author",
            "last_poster",
            "first_post_time",
            "last_post_time",
            "has_poll",
            "is_locked",
            "is_sticky"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "title": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "forum_id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "posts": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "rating": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "views": {
              "description": "Total number of times players have opened this thread.",
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "author": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "username",
                "karma"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "username": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "karma": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "last_poster": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "username",
                    "karma"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "username": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "karma": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "first_post_time": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "last_post_time": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "has_poll": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "is_locked": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "is_sticky": {
              "type": "boolean"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "content",
            "content_raw",
            "poll"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "content": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "content_raw": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "poll": {
              "description": "'poll' is null when 'has_poll' is false.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "question",
                    "answers_count",
                    "answers"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "question": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "answers_count": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "answers": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "required": [
                          "answer",
                          "votes"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "answer": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "votes": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Forum] GET /forum/threads
**Summary:** Get threads across all forum categories

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
```

## [Forum] GET /forum/{categoryIds}/threads
**Summary:** Get threads for specific public forum category or categories

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| categoryIds | path | Category id or a list of category ids (comma separated) | Yes | array |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json

    "threads",
    "_metadata"
  ],

      "items": {

            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "posts": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "rating": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "views": {
            "description": "Total number of times players have opened this thread.",

            "format": "int32"
          },
          "author": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "username",
              "karma"
            ],
            "properties": {

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "username": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "karma": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "last_poster": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "username",
                  "karma"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "username": {

                  },

                    "type": "integer",

            "oneOf": [
              {

              {
```

## [Forum] GET /forum/lookup
**Summary:** Get all available forum selections

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "categories",
              "lookup",
              "posts",
              "thread",
              "threads",
              "timestamp"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Forum] GET /forum/timestamp
**Summary:** Get current server time

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "timestamp"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Forum] GET /forum
**Summary:** Get any Forum selection

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]} |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

```json
                    }

                },

                            ],

                                "type": "string"
                              },
                              "votes": {
                                "type": "integer",

                              }

    },

      "required": [
        "posts",
        "_metadata"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "posts": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "thread_id",
              "author",
              "is_legacy",
              "is_topic",
              "is_edited",
              "is_pinned",
              "created_time",
              "edited_by",
              "has_quote",
              "quoted_post_id",
              "content",
              "likes",
              "dislikes"
            ],

              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "thread_id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "author": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "username",
                  "karma"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "username": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "karma": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "is_legacy": {
                "description": "Indicates whether post was made using the old formatting engine which doesn't use HTML.",
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_topic": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_edited": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "is_pinned": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "created_time": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "edited_by": {
                "description": "'edited_by' is null when 'is_edited' is false.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "has_quote": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "quoted_post_id": {
                "description": "'quoted_post_id' is null when 'has_quote' is false.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "content": {
                "description": "depending on the input 'cat' parameter, this will either return raw value (with HTML) or plain text. Legacy posts are returned as is, they can't be stripped of tags.",
                "type": "string"
              },
              "likes": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "dislikes": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "_metadata": {
          "required": [
            "links"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "links": {
              "required": [
                "next",
                "prev"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "next": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "prev": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "selections"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "selections": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "categories",
                  "lookup",
                  "posts",
                  "thread",
                  "threads",
                  "timestamp"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "string"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "timestamp"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  ]
}
```

## [Key] GET /key/log
**Summary:** Get current key log history

**Description:** Available for any key. <br>
 * This selection contains up to last 250 request logs.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "log"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "log": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "timestamp",
          "type",
          "selections",
          "id",
          "ip"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "timestamp": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "selections": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "id": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "comment": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "ip": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Key] GET /key/info
**Summary:** Get current key info

**Description:** Available for any key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json

  ],
```

## [Key] GET /key
**Summary:** Get any Key selection

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |
