## [Market] GET /market/{id}/auctionhouselisting
**Summary:** Get specific item auction house listings

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Listing id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "id",
    "seller",
    "buyer",
    "timestamp",
    "price",
    "bids",
    "item"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "seller": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "buyer": {
      "required": [
        "id",
        "name"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "timestamp": {
      "description": "Timestamp when the auction ended.",
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "price": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "bids": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "item": {
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "uid",
```

## [Market] GET /market/{id}/auctionhouse
**Summary:** Get specific item auction house listings

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Item id | Yes | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json

    "auctionhouse",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {

      "type": "array",

          "id",

          "buyer",
          "timestamp",
          "price",

          "item"

            "format": "int32"

            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
```

## [Market] GET /market/bazaar
**Summary:** Get bazaar directory

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> The default response is of type 'BazaarWeekly', but if a category is chosen, the response will be of type 'BazaarSpecialized'.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Category of specialized bazaars returned | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "bazaar"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "bazaar": {
      "description": "If there's a specific item ID passed or a category chosen, the response will be of type 'BazaarSpecialized', otherwise it will be 'BazaarWeekly'.",
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "busiest",
            "most_popular",
            "trending",
            "top_grossing",
            "bulk",
            "advanced_item",
            "bargain",
            "dollar_sale"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "busiest": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "allOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "is_open"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "is_open": {
                        "type": "boolean"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "weekly_customers"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "weekly_customers": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "most_popular": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "allOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "is_open"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "is_open": {
                        "type": "boolean"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "total_favorites"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "total_favorites": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "trending": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "allOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "is_open"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "is_open": {
                        "type": "boolean"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "recent_favorites"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "recent_favorites": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "top_grossing": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "allOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "is_open"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "is_open": {
                        "type": "boolean"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "weekly_income"
```

## [Market] GET /market/{id}/bazaar
**Summary:** Get item specialized bazaar directory

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Item id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "bazaar"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "bazaar": {
      "required": [
        "specialized"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "specialized": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "allOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name",
                  "is_open"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "is_open": {
                    "type": "boolean"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "weekly_customers"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "weekly_customers": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Market] GET /market/{id}/itemmarket
**Summary:** Get item market listings

**Description:** <b>Globally cached selection.</b><br><br>Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Item id | Yes | integer |
| bonus | query | Used to filter weapons with a specific bonus. | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "itemmarket",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "itemmarket": {
      "required": [
        "item",
        "listings",
        "cache_timestamp"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "item": {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name",
            "type",
            "average_price"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "type": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "average_price": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "listings": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "price",
                  "amount",
                  "item_details"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "price": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "amount": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "item_details": {
                    "required": [
                      "uid",
                      "stats",
                      "bonuses",
                      "rarity"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "uid": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int64"
                      },
                      "stats": {
                        "required": [
                          "damage",
                          "accuracy",
                          "armor",
                          "quality"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "damage": {
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "number",
                                "format": "float"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "accuracy": {
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "number",
                                "format": "float"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "armor": {
                            "oneOf": [
                              {
                                "type": "number",
                                "format": "float"
                              },
                              {
                                "type": "null"
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          "quality": {
                            "type": "number",
                            "format": "float"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      "bonuses": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                          "required": [
                            "id",
                            "title",
                            "description",
                            "value"
                          ],
                          "properties": {
                            "id": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            "title": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "description": {
                              "type": "string"
                            },
                            "value": {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            }
                          },
                          "type": "object"
                        }
                      },
                      "rarity": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "yellow",
                              "orange",
                              "red"
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "price",
                  "amount"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "price": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "amount": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "cache_timestamp": {
          "description": "Timestamp when the data was globally cached at.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "cache_delay": {
          "description": "The minimum amount of time needed before the cache timestamp can change.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "total": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Market] GET /market/{propertyTypeId}/properties
**Summary:** Get properties market listings

**Description:** <b>Globally cached selection.</b><br><br>Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| propertyTypeId | path | Property type id | Yes | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "properties",
    "properties_timestamp",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "properties": {
      "required": [
        "listings",
        "property"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "listings": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "happy",
              "cost",
              "market_price",
              "upkeep",
              "modifications"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "happy": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "cost": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "market_price": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "upkeep": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "modifications": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Hot Tub",
                    "Sauna",
                    "Open Bar",
                    "Small Pool",
                    "Medium Pool",
                    "Large Pool",
                    "Small Vault",
                    "Medium Vault",
                    "Large Vault",
                    "Extra Large Vault",
                    "Medical Facility",
                    "Advanced Shooting Range",
                    "Airstrip",
                    "Private Yacht",
                    "Sufficient Interior Modification",
                    "Superior Interior Modification"
                  ]
                }
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "property": {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "properties_timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "properties_delay": {
      "description": "The minimum amount of time needed before the cache timestamp can change.",
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "total": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Market] GET /market/lookup
**Summary:** Get all available market selections

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'pointsmarket'.",
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "bazaar",
              "itemmarket",
              "properties",
              "rentals",
              "lookup",
              "timestamp",
              "pointsmarket",
              "auctionhouse",
              "auctionhouselisting"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Market] GET /market
**Summary:** Get any Market selection

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}]} |
| legacy | query | Legacy selection names for which you want or expect API v1 response | No | array |
| cat | query | Category of specialized bazaars returned | No | string |
| bonus | query | Used to filter weapons with a specific bonus | No | string |
| sort | query | Direction to sort rows in | No | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "anyOf": [
    {
      "required": [
        "bazaar"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "bazaar": {
          "description": "If there's a specific item ID passed or a category chosen, the response will be of type 'BazaarSpecialized', otherwise it will be 'BazaarWeekly'.",
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "required": [
                "busiest",
                "most_popular",
                "trending",
                "top_grossing",
                "bulk",
                "advanced_item",
                "bargain",
                "dollar_sale"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "busiest": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "allOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "name",
                          "is_open"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "name": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "is_open": {
                            "type": "boolean"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "weekly_customers"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "weekly_customers": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                },
                "most_popular": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "allOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "name",
                          "is_open"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "name": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "is_open": {
                            "type": "boolean"
                          }

              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "uid": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int64"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "type": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Alcohol",
                    "Armor",
                    "Artifact",
                    "Book",
                    "Booster",
                    "Candy",
                    "Car",
                    "Clothing",
                    "Collectible",
                    "Drug",
                    "Energy Drink",
                    "Enhancer",
                    "Flower",
                    "Jewelry",
                    "Material",
                    "Medical",
                    "Other",
                    "Plushie",
                    "Special",
                    "Supply Pack",
                    "Tool",
                    "Unused",
                    "Weapon"
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            {
              "allOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "uid",
                    "stats",
                    "bonuses",
                    "rarity"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "uid": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int64"
                    },
                    "stats": {
                      "required": [
                        "damage",
                        "accuracy",
                        "armor",
                        "quality"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "damage": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "accuracy": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "armor": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "number",
                              "format": "float"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "quality": {
                          "type": "number",
                          "format": "float"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "bonuses": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "title",
                          "description",
                          "value"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "title": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "description": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "value": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      }
                    },
                    "rarity": {
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "yellow",
                            "orange",
                            "red"
                          ]
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name",
                    "type",
                    "sub_type"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int64"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "type": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "Alcohol",
                        "Armor",
                        "Artifact",
                        "Book",
                        "Booster",
                        "Candy",
                        "Car",
                        "Clothing",
                        "Collectible",
                        "Drug",
                        "Energy Drink",
                        "Enhancer",
                        "Flower",
                        "Jewelry",
                        "Material",
                        "Medical",
                        "Other",
                        "Plushie",
                        "Special",
                        "Supply Pack",
                        "Tool",
                        "Unused",
                        "Weapon"
                      ]
                    },
                    "sub_type": {
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "Heavy artillery",
                            "Machine gun",
                            "Pistol",
                            "Rifle",
                            "Shotgun",
                            "SMG",
                            "Temporary",
                            "Clubbing",
                            "Piercing",
                            "Slashing",
                            "Mechanical"
                          ]
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "properties",
        "properties_timestamp",
        "_metadata"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "properties": {
          "required": [
            "listings",
            "property"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "listings": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "happy",
                  "cost",
                  "market_price",
                  "upkeep",
                  "modifications"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "happy": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "cost": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "market_price": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "upkeep": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "modifications": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "Hot Tub",
                        "Sauna",
                        "Open Bar",
                        "Small Pool",
                        "Medium Pool",
                        "Large Pool",
                        "Small Vault",
                        "Medium Vault",
                        "Large Vault",
                        "Extra Large Vault",
                        "Medical Facility",
                        "Advanced Shooting Range",
                        "Airstrip",
                        "Private Yacht",
                        "Sufficient Interior Modification",
                        "Superior Interior Modification"
                      ]
                    }
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "property": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "properties_timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "properties_delay": {
          "description": "The minimum amount of time needed before the cache timestamp can change.",
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        },
        "_metadata": {
          "required": [
            "links"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "links": {
              "required": [
                "next",
                "prev"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "next": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "prev": {
                  "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "total": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "selections"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "selections": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'pointsmarket'.",
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "bazaar",
                  "itemmarket",
                  "properties",
                  "rentals",
                  "lookup",
                  "timestamp",
                  "pointsmarket",
                  "auctionhouse",
                  "auctionhouselisting"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "string"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "timestamp"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  ]
}
```

## [Racing] GET /racing/cars
**Summary:** Get cars and their racing stats

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns the stat details about racing cars.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "cars"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "cars": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "car_item_id",
          "car_item_name",
          "top_speed",
          "acceleration",
          "braking",
          "dirt",
          "handling",
          "safety",
          "tarmac",
          "class"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "car_item_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "car_item_name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "top_speed": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "acceleration": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "braking": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "dirt": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "handling": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "safety": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "tarmac": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "class": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "A",
              "B",
              "C",
              "D",
              "E"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Racing] GET /racing/carupgrades
**Summary:** Get all possible car upgrades

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns the details about all possible car upgrades.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "carupgrades"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "carupgrades": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",

          "name",
          "description",

            "required": [

              "braking",
              "handling",
              "safety",
              "dirt",
              "tarmac"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "top_speed": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "acceleration": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "braking": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"

                "type": "integer",

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "tarmac": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }

            "type": "object"

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }

            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Racing] GET /racing/races
**Summary:** Get races

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns a list of races, ordered by race start timestamp.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| cat | query | Category of races returned | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "races",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "races": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "title",
          "track_id",
          "creator_id",
          "status",
          "laps",
          "participants",
          "schedule",
          "requirements",
          "is_official"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "track_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "creator_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "open",
              "in_progress",
              "finished"
            ]
          },
          "laps": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "participants": {
            "required": [
              "minimum",
              "maximum",
              "current"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "minimum": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "maximum": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "current": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "schedule": {
            "required": [
              "join_from",
              "join_until",
              "start",
              "end"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "join_from": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "join_until": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "start": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "end": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "requirements": {
            "required": [
              "car_class",
              "driver_class",
              "car_item_id",
              "requires_stock_car",
              "requires_password",
              "join_fee"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "car_class": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "A",
                      "B",
                      "C",
                      "D",
                      "E"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "driver_class": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "A",
                      "B",
                      "C",
                      "D",
                      "E"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "car_item_id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "requires_stock_car": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "requires_password": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "join_fee": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "is_official": {
            "type": "boolean"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Racing] GET /racing/{raceId}/race
**Summary:** Get specific race details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns the details of a race.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| raceId | path | Race id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

#### 200 - Successful operation
```json

  ],

        {

              "required": [
                "minimum",
                "maximum",
                "current"

              "properties": {

                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"

                  "type": "integer",

                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "start": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "end": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "requirements": {
              "required": [
                "car_class",
                "driver_class",
                "car_item_id",
                "requires_stock_car",
                "requires_password",
                "join_fee"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "car_class": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "A",
                        "B",
                        "C",
                        "D",
                        "E"
                      ]
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "driver_class": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "A",
                        "B",
                        "C",
                        "D",
                        "E"
                      ]
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "car_item_id": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int64"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"

                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "requires_password": {

                },

                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "is_official": {

            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {

  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Racing] GET /racing/{trackId}/records
**Summary:** Get track records

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns a list of 5 best lap records for the chosen track and car class.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| trackId | path | Track id | Yes | integer |
| cat | query | Car class | Yes | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "records"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "records": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "driver_id",
          "driver_name",
          "car_item_id",
          "lap_time",
          "car_item_name"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "driver_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "driver_name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "car_item_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "lap_time": {
            "type": "number",
            "format": "float"
          },
          "car_item_name": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Racing] GET /racing/tracks
**Summary:** Get race tracks and descriptions

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Returns the details about racing tracks.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "tracks"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "tracks": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "title",
          "description"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Racing] GET /racing/lookup
**Summary:** Get all available racing selections

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "cars",
              "carupgrades",
              "lookup",
              "race",
              "races",
              "records",
              "timestamp",
              "tracks"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Racing] GET /racing/timestamp

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
    "timestamp"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Racing] GET /racing
**Summary:** Get any Racing selection

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}]} |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| cat | query | Selection category | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["official","custom"]},{"type":"string","enum":["A","B","C","D","E"]}]} |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json

    {

        "races": {

                "format": "int32"
              },

                    "oneOf": [

                        "type": "integer",

                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "handling": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "safety": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "dirt": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "tarmac": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              "cost": {
                "required": [
                  "points",
                  "cash"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "points": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "cash": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "selections"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "selections": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "cars",
                  "carupgrades",
                  "lookup",
                  "race",
                  "races",
                  "records",
                  "timestamp",
                  "tracks"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "string"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    {
      "required": [
        "timestamp"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int32"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## [Property] GET /property/{id}/property
**Summary:** Get a specific property

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Property id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "property"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "property": {
      "allOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "owner",
            "property",
            "happy",
            "upkeep",
            "market_price",
            "modifications",
            "staff"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "owner": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "property": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "happy": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            },
            "upkeep": {
              "required": [
                "property",
                "staff"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "property": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "staff": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "market_price": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "modifications": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Hot Tub",
                  "Sauna",
                  "Open Bar",
                  "Small Pool",
                  "Medium Pool",
                  "Large Pool",
                  "Small Vault",
                  "Medium Vault",
                  "Large Vault",
                  "Extra Large Vault",
                  "Medical Facility",
                  "Advanced Shooting Range",
                  "Airstrip",
                  "Private Yacht",
                  "Sufficient Interior Modification",
                  "Superior Interior Modification"
                ]
              }
            },
            "staff": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "type",
                  "amount"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "type": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Maid",
                      "Guard",
                      "Doctor",
                      "Pilot",
                      "Butler"
                    ]
                  },
                  "amount": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "status",
            "used_by"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "used_by": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "status": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "none",
                "in_use"
              ]
            },
            "rented_by": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Property] GET /property/lookup
**Summary:** Get all available property selections

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "property",
              "lookup",
              "timestamp"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
    "timestamp"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```
