## [Torn] GET /torn/attacklog
**Summary:** Get attack log details

**Description:** Requires public key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| log | query | Code of the attack log. E.g. d51ad4fe6be884b309b142e2d1d4f807 | Yes | string |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "attacklog",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "attacklog": {
      "required": [
        "log",
        "summary"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "log": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "text",
              "timestamp",
              "action",
              "icon",
              "attacker",
              "defender"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "text": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "action": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "attackerhosp",
                  "busy",
                  "critical hit",
                  "attackerjail",
                  "escapefail",
                  "hit",
                  "hosp",
                  "joinfight",
                  "leave",
                  "loot",
                  "lost",
                  "missed",
                  "mug",
                  "noAmmo",
                  "onItemUseEff",
                  "opponenthosp",
                  "opponentjail",
                  "paralyzed",
                  "reload",
                  "runaway",
                  "specialTemp",
                  "specialTempI",
                  "stalemate",
                  "startfight",
                  "stunned",
                  "suppressed",
                  "timeout",
                  "won"
                ]
              },
              "icon": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "attacker": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "description": "This value could be null in stealthed attacks.",
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name",
                      "item"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "item": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "description": "This object could be null if there was no item being used in this turn or during this effect.",
                            "properties": {
                              "id": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int64"
                              },
                              "name": {
                                "type": "string"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "defender": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "description": "This value could be null in stealthed attacks.",
                    "required": [
                      "id",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "id": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "attacker_item": {
                "description": "This field only exists if the attacker is stealthed and they used a temporary item.",
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "name"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  "name": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "summary": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "hits",
              "misses",
              "damage"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "name": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "description": "Name of the participant, could be null in stealthed attacks.",
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "hits": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "misses": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "damage": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/bounties
**Summary:** Get bounties

**Description:** <b>Globally cached selection.</b><br><br>Requires public key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "bounties",
    "bounties_timestamp",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "bounties": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "target_id",
          "target_name",
          "target_level",
          "lister_id",
          "lister_name",
          "reward",
          "reason",
          "quantity",
          "is_anonymous",
          "valid_until"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "target_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "target_name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "target_level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "lister_id": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "lister_name": {
            "description": "If the bounty is anonymous this field is null.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "reward": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "reason": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "quantity": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "is_anonymous": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "valid_until": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "bounties_timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "bounties_delay": {
      "description": "The minimum amount of time needed before the cache timestamp can change.",
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        "total": {
          "type": "integer",
          "format": "int64"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/calendar
**Summary:** Get calendar information

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Get the details about competitions & events in the running year.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Success
```json
{
  "required": [
    "calendar"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "calendar": {
      "required": [
        "competitions",
        "events"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "competitions": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "title",
              "description",
              "start",
              "end"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "start": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "end": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "fixed_start_time": {
                "description": "This value is false if the event uses personal calendar time.",
                "type": "boolean"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "events": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "required": [
              "title",
              "description",
              "start",
              "end"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "title": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "start": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "end": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "fixed_start_time": {
                "description": "This value is false if the event uses personal calendar time.",
                "type": "boolean"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/crimes
**Summary:** Get crimes information

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Return the details about released crimes.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "crimes"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "crimes": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "category_id",
          "enhancer_id",
          "enhancer_name",
          "unique_outcomes_count",
          "unique_outcomes_ids",
          "notes"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "category_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "category_name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "enhancer_id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "enhancer_name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "unique_outcomes_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "unique_outcomes_ids": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int32"
            }
          },
          "notes": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/education
**Summary:** Get education information

**Description:** Requires public access key.<br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "education"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "education": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "courses"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "courses": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "code",
                "name",
                "description",
                "duration",
                "rewards",
                "prerequisites"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "code": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "description": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "duration": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "rewards": {
                  "required": [
                    "working_stats",
                    "effect",
                    "honor"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "working_stats": {
                      "required": [
                        "manual_labor",
                        "intelligence",
                        "endurance"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "manual_labor": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "intelligence": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        },
                        "endurance": {
                          "oneOf": [
                            {
                              "type": "integer",
                              "format": "int32"
                            },
                            {
                              "type": "null"
                            }
                          ]
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    "effect": {
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    "honor": {
                      "oneOf": [
                        {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        {
                          "type": "null"
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "prerequisites": {
                  "required": [
                    "cost",
                    "courses"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "cost": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "courses": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/elimination
**Summary:** Get current standings for all elimination teams

**Description:** Requires public key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "elimination"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "elimination": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "participants",
          "position",
          "score",
          "lives",
          "wins",
          "losses",
          "eliminated",
          "eliminated_timestamp",
          "leaders"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "participants": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "position": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "score": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "lives": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "wins": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "losses": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "eliminated": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "eliminated_timestamp": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "leaders": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "allOf": [
                {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "name"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    },
                    "name": {
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                {
                  "required": [
                    "active"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "active": {
                      "type": "boolean"
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/{id}/eliminationteam
**Summary:** Get players in a specific elimination team

**Description:** Requires public key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Elimination team id | Yes | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "eliminationteam",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "eliminationteam": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "level",
          "last_action",
          "status",
          "attacks",
          "score"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "level": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "last_action": {
            "description": "Details about a user's last action.",
            "required": [
              "status",
              "timestamp",
              "relative"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Online",
                  "Idle",
                  "Offline"
                ]
              },
              "timestamp": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "relative": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "status": {
            "description": "Details about a user's status.",
            "required": [
              "description",
              "details",
              "state",
              "until",
              "color"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "details": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "state": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Abroad",
                      "Awoken",
                      "Dormant",
                      "Fallen",
                      "Federal",
                      "Hospital",
                      "Jail",
                      "Okay",
                      "Traveling"
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "color": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "until": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "plane_image_type": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "private_jet",
                  "light_aircraft",
                  "airliner"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "attacks": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "score": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/factionhof
**Summary:** Get faction hall of fame positions for a specific category

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| cat | query | Leaderboards category | Yes | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "factionhof",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "factionhof": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "members",
          "position",
          "rank",
          "values"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "members": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "position": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "rank": {
            "description": "The full rank title & division of the faction.",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "values": {
            "required": [
              "chain",
              "chain_duration",
              "respect"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "chain": {
                "description": "Maximum chain achieved by the faction. Null if chosen category is 'rank' or 'respect'.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "chain_duration": {
                "description": "The duration of the chain. Null if chosen category is 'rank' or 'respect'.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "respect": {
                "description": "Null if chosen category is 'chain'.",
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    },
    "_metadata": {
      "required": [
        "links"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "links": {
          "required": [
            "next",
            "prev"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "next": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the next set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            },
            "prev": {
              "description": "Auto-generated link to get the prev set of records.",
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      },
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/factiontree
**Summary:** Get full faction tree

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> 

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "factionTree"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "factionTree": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "name",
          "branches"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "branches": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "id",
                "name",
                "upgrades"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "type": "integer",
                  "format": "int32"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "upgrades": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "required": [
                      "name",
                      "level",
                      "ability",
                      "challenge",
                      "cost"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "level": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "ability": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "cost": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "challenge": {
                        "oneOf": [
                          {
                            "required": [
                              "description",
                              "amount_required",
                              "stat"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "description": {
                                "type": "string"
                              },
                              "amount_required": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int64"
                              },
                              "stat": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "enum": [
                                  "medicalitemsused",
                                  "criminaloffences",
                                  "organisedcrimerespect",
                                  "organisedcrimemoney",
                                  "organisedcrimesuccess",
                                  "organisedcrimefail",
                                  "attackswon",
                                  "attackslost",
                                  "attackschain",
                                  "attacksleave",
                                  "attacksmug",
                                  "attackshosp",
                                  "bestchain",
                                  "busts",
                                  "revives",
                                  "jails",
                                  "hosps",
                                  "medicalitemrecovery",
                                  "medicalcooldownused",
                                  "gymtrains",
                                  "gymstrength",
                                  "gymspeed",
                                  "gymenergy",
                                  "gymdefense",
                                  "gymdexterity",
                                  "candyused",
                                  "alcoholused",
                                  "energydrinkused",
                                  "drugsused",
                                  "drugoverdoses",
                                  "rehabs",
                                  "caymaninterest",
                                  "traveltimes",
                                  "traveltime",
                                  "hunting",
                                  "attacksdamagehits",
                                  "attacksdamage",
                                  "hosptimegiven",
                                  "hosptimereceived",
                                  "attacksdamaging",
                                  "attacksrunaway",
                                  "highestterritories",
                                  "territoryrespect"
                                ]
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "null"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/honors
**Summary:** Get all honors

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "honors"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "honors": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "description": "Properties 'circulation', 'equipped' & 'rarity' are only populated for honors which do not have type.id value 1.",
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "description",
          "type"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "attacking",
                  "camo",
                  "weapons",
                  "education",
                  "crimes",
                  "drugs",
                  "jail",
                  "hospital",
                  "travel",
                  "gym",
                  "level",
                  "competitions",
                  "money",
                  "items",
                  "commitment",
                  "casino",
                  "missions",
                  "misc",
                  "default"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "circulation": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "equipped": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "rarity": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Extremely Rare",
              "Very Rare",
              "Rare",
              "Limited",
              "Uncommon",
              "Common",
              "Very Common",
              "Unknown",
              "Unknown Rarity"
            ]
          },
          "crimes_version": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "v1",
              "v2"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

```json
{

    "honors"

  "properties": {

          },

          },

              "Unknown Rarity"
            ]
          },
          "crimes_version": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "v1",
              "v2"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/hof
**Summary:** Get player hall of fame positions for a specific category

**Description:** Requires public key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| cat | query | Leaderboards category | Yes | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation

```json
  "required": [
    "hof",
    "_metadata"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "hof": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [

            "required": [

              "faction_id",
              "level",

              "rank_name",
              "rank_number",

              "signed_up",

              },

                "type": "string",

                  "Absolute beginner",
                  "Beginner",

                "type": "integer",

              },
              "signed_up": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },

                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "value": {
                "description": "Value representing the chosen category. Traveltime is shown in seconds. If the chosen category is 'rank', the value is of type string. If the chosen category is 'racingskill', the value is of type float. Otherwise it is an integer.",

                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "number",

                ]
              },

              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },

              {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "username",
                  "faction_id",
                  "level",
                  "last_action",
                  "rank_name",

                  "position",
                  "signed_up",
                  "age_in_days",
                  "value",
                  "rank"

                  },

                  },

                      "Champion",

                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/itemammo
**Summary:** Get information about ammo

**Description:** Requires public key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "itemammo"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "itemammo": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "price",
          "types"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "price": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "types": {
            "description": "Types of ammo",
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Standard",
                "Hollow Point",
                "Piercing",
                "Tracer",
                "Incendiary"
              ]
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/{id}/itemdetails
**Summary:** Get information about a specific item

**Description:** Requires public key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| id | path | Item uid | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "itemdetails"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "itemdetails": {
      "allOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "uid",
            "stats",
            "bonuses",
            "rarity"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "uid": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "stats": {
              "required": [
                "damage",
                "accuracy",
                "armor",
                "quality"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "damage": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "number",
                      "format": "float"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "accuracy": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "number",
                      "format": "float"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "armor": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "type": "number",
                      "format": "float"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "quality": {
                  "type": "number",
                  "format": "float"
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            },
            "bonuses": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": {
                "required": [
                  "id",
                  "title",
                  "description",
                  "value"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "id": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  },
                  "title": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "description": {
                    "type": "string"
                  },
                  "value": {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int32"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              }
            },
            "rarity": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "yellow",
                    "orange",
                    "red"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name",
            "type",
            "sub_type"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "id": {
              "type": "integer",
              "format": "int64"
            },
            "name": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Alcohol",
                "Armor",
                "Artifact",
                "Book",
                "Booster",
                "Candy",
                "Car",
                "Clothing",
                "Collectible",
                "Drug",
                "Energy Drink",
                "Enhancer",
                "Flower",
                "Jewelry",
                "Material",
                "Medical",
                "Other",
                "Plushie",
                "Special",
                "Supply Pack",
                "Tool",
                "Unused",
                "Weapon"
              ]
            },
            "sub_type": {
              "oneOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Heavy artillery",
                    "Machine gun",
                    "Pistol",
                    "Rifle",
                    "Shotgun",
                    "SMG",
                    "Temporary",
                    "Clubbing",
                    "Piercing",
                    "Slashing",
                    "Mechanical"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          "type": "object"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/itemmods

**Description:** Requires public key.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "itemmods"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "itemmods": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "image",
          "description",
          "dual_fit",
          "weapons"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "image": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "dual_fit": {
            "description": "Whether the upgrade fits on dual weapons.",
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "weapons": {
            "description": "The weapon types this upgrade can be attached to.",
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Heavy artillery",
                "Machine gun",
                "Pistol",
                "Rifle",
                "Shotgun",
                "SMG",
                "Temporary",
                "Clubbing",
                "Piercing",
                "Slashing",
                "Mechanical"
              ]
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/items
**Summary:** Get information about items

**Description:** Requires public key.<br>Default category is 'All'.<br>Details are not populated when requesting the category 'All'.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| cat | query | Item category type | No | string |
| sort | query | Sort rows from newest to oldest<br>Default ordering is ascending | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "items"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "items": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "description",
          "effect",
          "requirement",
          "image",
          "type",
          "sub_type",
          "is_masked",
          "is_tradable",
          "is_found_in_city",
          "value",
          "circulation",
          "details"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "effect": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "requirement": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "image": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Alcohol",
              "Armor",
              "Artifact",
              "Book",
              "Booster",
              "Candy",
              "Car",
              "Clothing",
              "Collectible",
              "Drug",
              "Energy Drink",
              "Enhancer",
              "Flower",
              "Jewelry",
              "Material",
              "Medical",
              "Other",
              "Plushie",
              "Special",
              "Supply Pack",
              "Tool",
              "Unused",
              "Weapon"
            ]
          },
          "sub_type": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Heavy artillery",
                  "Machine gun",
                  "Pistol",
                  "Rifle",
                  "Shotgun",
                  "SMG",
                  "Temporary",
                  "Clubbing",
                  "Piercing",
                  "Slashing",
                  "Mechanical"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "is_masked": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_tradable": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_found_in_city": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "value": {
            "required": [
              "vendor",
              "buy_price",
              "sell_price",
              "market_price"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "vendor": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "country",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "country": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "buy_price": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "sell_price": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "market_price": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "circulation": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "details": {
            "description": "If the item 'type' is 'Armor' then TornItemArmorDetails is returned.<br>If the item 'type' is 'Weapon' then TornItemWeaponDetails is returned.<br>Otherwise, null is returned.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "stealth_level",
                  "base_stats",
                  "category",
                  "ammo",
                  "mods"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "stealth_level": {
                    "type": "number",
                    "format": "float"
                  },
                  "base_stats": {
                    "required": [
                      "damage",
                      "accuracy",
                      "armor"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "damage": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "accuracy": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "armor": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "category": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Melee",
                      "Secondary",
                      "Primary",
                      "Temporary"
                    ]
                  },
                  "ammo": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "name",
                          "magazine_rounds",
                          "rate_of_fire"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "name": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "magazine_rounds": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "rate_of_fire": {
                            "required": [
                              "minimum",
                              "maximum"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "minimum": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "maximum": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "mods": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "coverage",
                  "base_stats"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "coverage": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "name",
                        "value"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "Full Body",
                            "Heart",
                            "Stomach",
                            "Chest",
                            "Arm",
                            "Groin",
                            "Leg",
                            "Throat",
                            "Hand",
                            "Foot",
                            "Head"
                          ]
                        },
                        "value": {
                          "type": "number",
                          "format": "float"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "base_stats": {
                    "required": [
                      "damage",
                      "accuracy",
                      "armor"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "damage": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "accuracy": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "armor": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/{ids}/items
**Summary:** Get information about items

**Description:** Requires public key.<br>Details are always populated when available.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| ids | path | Item id or a list of item ids (comma separated) | Yes | array |
| sort | query | Sort rows from newest to oldest<br>Default ordering is ascending | No | string |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "items"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "items": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "description",
          "effect",
          "requirement",
          "image",
          "type",
          "sub_type",
          "is_masked",
          "is_tradable",
          "is_found_in_city",
          "value",
          "circulation",
          "details"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "effect": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "requirement": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "image": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Alcohol",
              "Armor",
              "Artifact",
              "Book",
              "Booster",
              "Candy",
              "Car",
              "Clothing",
              "Collectible",
              "Drug",
              "Energy Drink",
              "Enhancer",
              "Flower",
              "Jewelry",
              "Material",
              "Medical",
              "Other",
              "Plushie",
              "Special",
              "Supply Pack",
              "Tool",
              "Unused",
              "Weapon"
            ]
          },
          "sub_type": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "Heavy artillery",
                  "Machine gun",
                  "Pistol",
                  "Rifle",
                  "Shotgun",
                  "SMG",
                  "Temporary",
                  "Clubbing",
                  "Piercing",
                  "Slashing",
                  "Mechanical"
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "is_masked": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_tradable": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "is_found_in_city": {
            "type": "boolean"
          },
          "value": {
            "required": [
              "vendor",
              "buy_price",
              "sell_price",
              "market_price"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "vendor": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "required": [
                      "country",
                      "name"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "country": {
                        "type": "string"
                      },
                      "name": {
                        "type": "string"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "buy_price": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "sell_price": {
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "type": "integer",
                    "format": "int64"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "null"
                  }
                ]
              },
              "market_price": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "circulation": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int64"
          },
          "details": {
            "description": "If the item 'type' is 'Armor' then TornItemArmorDetails is returned.<br>If the item 'type' is 'Weapon' then TornItemWeaponDetails is returned.<br>Otherwise, null is returned.",
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "required": [
                  "stealth_level",
                  "base_stats",
                  "category",
                  "ammo",
                  "mods"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "stealth_level": {
                    "type": "number",
                    "format": "float"
                  },
                  "base_stats": {
                    "required": [
                      "damage",
                      "accuracy",
                      "armor"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "damage": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "accuracy": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "armor": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  },
                  "category": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "enum": [
                      "Melee",
                      "Secondary",
                      "Primary",
                      "Temporary"
                    ]
                  },
                  "ammo": {
                    "oneOf": [
                      {
                        "required": [
                          "id",
                          "name",
                          "magazine_rounds",
                          "rate_of_fire"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "id": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "name": {
                            "type": "string"
                          },
                          "magazine_rounds": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "format": "int32"
                          },
                          "rate_of_fire": {
                            "required": [
                              "minimum",
                              "maximum"
                            ],
                            "properties": {
                              "minimum": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              },
                              "maximum": {
                                "type": "integer",
                                "format": "int32"
                              }
                            },
                            "type": "object"
                          }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "null"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  "mods": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32"
                    }
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "required": [
                  "coverage",
                  "base_stats"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "coverage": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                      "required": [
                        "name",
                        "value"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string",
                          "enum": [
                            "Full Body",
                            "Heart",
                            "Stomach",
                            "Chest",
                            "Arm",
                            "Groin",
                            "Leg",
                            "Throat",
                            "Hand",
                            "Foot",
                            "Head"
                          ]
                        },
                        "value": {
                          "type": "number",
                          "format": "float"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    }
                  },
                  "base_stats": {
                    "required": [
                      "damage",
                      "accuracy",
                      "armor"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "damage": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "accuracy": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      },
                      "armor": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "format": "int32"
                      }
                    },
                    "type": "object"
                  }
                },
                "type": "object"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/logcategories
**Summary:** Get available log categories

**Description:** Requires public key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "logcategories"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "logcategories": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "title"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/{logCategoryId}/logtypes

| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |

```json
{

    "logtypes"

    "logtypes": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "title"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/medals
**Summary:** Get all medals

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "medals"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "medals": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "description",
          "type",
          "circulation",
          "equipped",
          "rarity"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "title"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "title": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "combat",
                  "commitment",
                  "crime",
                  "level",
                  "miscellaneous",
                  "networth",
                  "rank"
                ]
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "circulation": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "rarity": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "Extremely Rare",
              "Very Rare",
              "Rare",
              "Limited",
              "Uncommon",
              "Common",
              "Very Common",
              "Unknown",
              "Unknown Rarity"
            ]
          },
          "crimes_version": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "v1",
              "v2"
            ]
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---
