## [Torn] GET /torn/organizedcrimes
**Summary:** Get organized crimes information

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Return the details about released faction organized crimes.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "organizedcrimes"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "organizedcrimes": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "name",
          "description",
          "difficulty",
          "spawn",
          "scope",
          "slots",
          "prerequisite"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "difficulty": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "spawn": {
            "required": [
              "level",
              "name"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "level": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "scope": {
            "required": [
              "cost",
              "return"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "cost": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "return": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "prerequisite": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ]
          },
          "slots": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "required": [
                "position_info",
                "name",
                "required_item"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "id": {
                  "description": "This field is now available in 'position_info' object as 'id' field.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "P1",
                    "P2",
                    "P3",
                    "P4",
                    "P5",
                    "P6"
                  ],
                  "deprecated": true
                },
                "position_info": {
                  "required": [
                    "id",
                    "label",
                    "number"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "id": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "P1",
                        "P2",
                        "P3",
                        "P4",
                        "P5",
                        "P6"
                      ]
                    },
                    "label": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "number": {
                      "description": "This field is no longer needed as there's 'label' field now.<br>This field will be removed on 1st of June 2026.",
                      "type": "integer",
                      "format": "int32",
                      "deprecated": true
                    }
                  },
                  "type": "object"
                },
                "name": {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "required_item": {
                  "oneOf": [
                    {
                      "required": [
                        "id",
                        "name",
                        "is_used"
                      ],
                      "properties": {
                        "id": {
                          "type": "integer",
                          "format": "int64"
                        },
                        "name": {
                          "type": "string"
                        },
                        "is_used": {
                          "type": "boolean"
                        }
                      },
                      "type": "object"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "null"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "type": "object"
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/properties
**Summary:** Get properties details

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "properties": {
    "properties": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "cost",
          "happy",
          "upkeep",
          "modifications",
          "staff"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "cost": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "happy": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "upkeep": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "modifications": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Hot Tub",
                "Sauna",
                "Open Bar",
                "Small Pool",
                "Medium Pool",
                "Large Pool",
                "Small Vault",
                "Medium Vault",
                "Large Vault",
                "Extra Large Vault",
                "Medical Facility",
                "Advanced Shooting Range",
                "Airstrip",
                "Private Yacht",
                "Sufficient Interior Modification",
                "Superior Interior Modification"
              ]
            }
          },
          "staff": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "Maid",
                "Guard",
                "Doctor",
                "Pilot",
                "Butler"
              ]
            }
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |

```json
{
  "required": [
    "stocks"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "stocks": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "images",
          "acronym",
          "market",
          "bonus"

        "properties": {

            "format": "int32"

            "type": "string"
          },

            "required": [
              "logo",
              "full"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "logo": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "full": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          },
          "market": {
            "required": [
              "price",
              "cap",
              "shares",
              "investors"
            ],
            "properties": {

                "type": "number",
                "format": "float"
              },
              "cap": {

                "format": "int64"
              },
              "shares": {
                "type": "integer",

              },

                "format": "int64"
              }

            "type": "object"
          },

              "frequency",

                "type": "boolean"

                "format": "int32"
              },
              "requirement": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int64"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            },
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

## [Torn] GET /torn/{stockId}/stocks
**Summary:** Get specific stock with chart history

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| stockId | path | Stock id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "stocks"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "stocks": {
      "allOf": [
        {
          "required": [
            "id",
            "name",
            "images",
            "acronym",
            "market",
            "bonus"
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/{crimeId}/subcrimes
**Summary:** Get Subcrimes information

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Return the details about possible actions for a specific crime.

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| crimeId | path | Crime id | Yes | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "subcrimes"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "subcrimes": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "required": [
          "id",
          "name",
          "nerve_cost"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "id": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          },
          "name": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "nerve_cost": {
            "type": "integer",
            "format": "int32"
          }
        },
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/territory
**Summary:** Get territory details

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| ids | query | Specific territory id or a list of territory ids (comma separated) | No | array |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/lookup
**Summary:** Get all available torn selections

**Description:** Requires public key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "selections"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "selections": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "oneOf": [
          {
            "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'bank','cards','cityshops','companies','competition','gyms','itemdetails','itemstats','organisedcrimes','pawnshop','pokertables','rockpaperscissors','searchforcash','shoplifting','stats'.\n *   The following selections are not available in API v2: 'dirtybombs','raidreport','raids', 'chainreport', 'rackets', 'rankedwarreport', 'rankedwars', 'territorynames', 'territorywarreport', 'territorywars'.",
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "attacklog",
              "bounties",
              "calendar",
              "crimes",
              "education",
              "elimination",
              "eliminationteam",
              "factionhof",
              "factiontree",
              "hof",
              "honors",
              "itemammo",
              "itemmods",
              "items",
              "logcategories",
              "logtypes",
              "lookup",
              "medals",
              "merits",
              "organizedcrimes",
              "properties",
              "stocks",
              "subcrimes",
              "territory",
              "timestamp",
              "bank",
              "cards",
              "cityshops",
              "companies",
              "competition",
              "gyms",
              "itemdetails",
              "itemstats",
              "organisedcrimes",
              "pawnshop",
              "pokertables",
              "rockpaperscissors",
              "searchforcash",
              "shoplifting",
              "stats"
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn/timestamp
**Summary:** Get current server time

**Description:** Requires public key. <br>

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

### Responses
#### 200 - Successful operation
```json
{
  "required": [
    "timestamp"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "timestamp": {
      "type": "integer",
      "format": "int32"
    }
  },
  "type": "object"
}
```

---

## [Torn] GET /torn
**Summary:** Get any Torn selection

**Description:** Requires public access key. <br> Choose one or more selections (comma separated).

### Parameters
| Name | In | Description | Required | Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| selections | query | Selection names | No | array |
| id | query | selection id | No | |
| legacy | query | Legacy selection names for which you want or expect API v1 response | No | array |
| striptags | query | Determines if fields include HTML or not ('Hospitalized by <a href=...>user</a>' vs 'Hospitalized by user'). | No | string |
| limit | query |  | No | integer |
| to | query | Timestamp that sets the upper limit for the data returned. Data returned will be up to and including this time | No | integer |
| from | query | Timestamp that sets the lower limit for the data returned. Data returned will be after this time | No | integer |
| sort | query | Sorted by the greatest timestamps | No | string |
| cat | query | Selection category | No | {"oneOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["respect","chains","rank"]},{"type":"string","enum":["level","busts","rank","traveltime","workstats","networth","revives","defends","offences","attacks","awards","racingwins","racingpoints","racingskill"]},{"type":"string","enum":["All","Alcohol","Armor","Artifact","Book","Booster","Candy","Car","Clothing","Collectible","Defensive","Drug","Energy Drink","Enhancer","Flower","Jewelry","Material","Medical","Melee","Other","Plushie","Primary","Secondary","Special","Supply Pack","Temporary","Tool","Unused","Weapon"]}]} |
| offset | query |  | No | integer |
| timestamp | query | Timestamp to bypass cache | No | string |
| comment | query | Comment for your tool/service/bot/website to be visible in the logs. | No | string |
| key | query | API key (Public).<br>It's not required to use this parameter when passing the API key via the Authorization header. | No | string |

```json
              },

                "description": "If the item 'type' is 'Armor' then TornItemArmorDetails is returned.<br>If the item 'type' is 'Weapon' then TornItemWeaponDetails is returned.<br>Otherwise, null is returned.",

          "items": {
            "required": [
              "id",
              "name",
              "image",
              "description",
              "dual_fit",
              "weapons"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "id": {
                "type": "integer",
                "format": "int32"
              },
              "name": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "image": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "dual_fit": {
                "description": "Whether the upgrade fits on dual weapons.",
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "weapons": {
                "description": "The weapon types this upgrade can be attached to.",
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "Heavy artillery",
                    "Machine gun",
                    "Pistol",
                    "Rifle",
                    "Shotgun",
                    "SMG",
                    "Temporary",

    {
      "required": [
        "selections"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "selections": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "oneOf": [
              {
                "description": "The following selections will fallback to API v1 and may change at any time: 'bank','cards','cityshops','companies','competition','gyms','itemdetails','itemstats','organisedcrimes','pawnshop','pokertables','rockpaperscissors','searchforcash','shoplifting','stats'.\n *   The following selections are not available in API v2: 'dirtybombs','raidreport','raids', 'chainreport', 'rackets', 'rankedwarreport', 'rankedwars', 'territorynames', 'territorywarreport', 'territorywars'.",
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "attacklog",
                  "bounties",
                  "calendar",
                  "crimes",
                  "education",
                  "elimination",
                  "eliminationteam",
                  "factionhof",
                  "factiontree",
```
